light_analysis.result: 实验在多种大小和家族的LLMs上进行，覆盖四个NLP任务。NeuronLLM在性能上优于现有基线方法，展示了其在神经元识别和任务表现上的有效性。具体数据未在摘要中提供，但结果表明该框架能更好地理解LLM功能组织并提升任务可控性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeuronLLM的主要贡献是提出了一个任务级LLM理解框架，通过识别好坏神经元为功能组织提供新见解。学术上推动了可解释AI的发展，应用上支持LLM的任务级可控优化。未来工作可扩展至更多任务类型和模型，并进一步验证其在复杂场景中的鲁棒性。

title: Interleaved Tool-Call Reasoning for Protein Function Understanding
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have highlighted the effectiveness of chain-of-thought reasoning in symbolic domains such as mathematics and programming. However, our study shows that directly transferring such text-based reasoning paradigms to protein function understanding is ineffective: reinforcement learning mainly amplifies superficial keyword patterns while failing to introduce new biological knowledge, resulting in limited generalization. We argue that protein function prediction is a knowledge-intensive scientific task that fundamentally relies on external biological priors and computational tools rather than purely internal reasoning. To address this gap, we propose PFUA, a tool-augmented protein reasoning agent that unifies problem decomposition, tool invocation, and grounded answer generation. Instead of relying on long unconstrained reasoning traces, PFUA integrates domain-specific tools to produce verifiable intermediate evidence. Experiments on four benchmarks demonstrate that PFUA consistently outperforms text-only reasoning models with an average performance improvement of 103%.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出PFUA，一个工具增强的蛋白质推理代理，通过集成领域特定工具来改进蛋白质功能理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在数学等符号领域的链式推理虽然有效，但直接应用于蛋白质功能理解时，基于文本的推理范式效果不佳。强化学习仅放大表面关键词模式，未能引入新生物知识，导致泛化能力有限。蛋白质功能预测是知识密集型科学任务，需要依赖外部生物先验和计算工具，而非纯内部推理，这凸显了开发更有效方法的必要性。
light_analysis.method: PFUA是一个工具增强的蛋白质推理代理，它统一了问题分解、工具调用和基于证据的答案生成。与依赖长的无约束推理轨迹不同，PFUA集成领域特定工具来产生可验证的中间证据，提供更可靠的推理过程。该方法避免了纯文本模型的局限性，利用计算工具增强科学推理。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准测试中，PFUA的性能一致优于纯文本推理模型，平均性能提升103%。实验结果表明，通过工具集成，PFUA能更有效地理解和预测蛋白质功能，显著提高了准确性和泛化能力。对比基线方法，PFUA在多个任务中表现出一致的优势，验证了工具增强推理的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了PFUA，强调外部知识和计算工具在科学任务中的关键作用，为蛋白质功能理解提供了实用解决方案。该研究具有学术和实际应用价值，潜在局限性如工具集成复杂性未明确说明，未来工作可能涉及扩展到其他生物领域。

title: When Do Tools and Planning Help Large Language Models Think? A Cost- and Latency-Aware Benchmark
abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) increasingly rely on inference-time planning and external tools to improve reasoning. We benchmark this behavior on two real-world settings: event-centric question answering over graph-structured knowledge (Event-QA) and persuasive response generation in Reddit ChangeMyView (CMV). Using LangChain and LangGraph, we compare a one-shot baseline against a plan-execute-replan agent equipped with task-specific tools (DBpedia SPARQL/lookup/schema exploration, Wikipedia-focused retrieval, and topical web search). We evaluate on 60 examples each from Event-QA and CMV (3 splits of 20), and report both mean end-to-end latency and per-example token cost estimates. We evaluate GPT-4o and GPT-4o-mini under identical workflows and report accuracy and end-to-end latency. On Event-QA, the best tool-augmented configuration improves accuracy (e.g., 47.5\% $\rightarrow$ 67.5\% for GPT-4o) while increasing latency by orders of magnitude ($\sim$8s $\rightarrow$ $\sim$317s per example). On CMV, one-shot prompting is strongest (e.g., GPT-4o-mini achieves 75\% at $\sim$6s), and planning+search increases latency substantially without consistent gains. However, complex multi-tool orchestration exposes failure modes where the smaller model degrades. Overall, the findings highlight the need for task-specific, cost-aware choices of both model size and agent/tooling complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过基准测试探究了在事件问答和说服响应生成任务中，大型语言模型使用工具和规划时的效能与成本延迟权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代大型语言模型越来越多地依赖推理时规划和外部工具来增强推理能力，但这种方法可能带来显著的成本和延迟开销。本研究旨在解决现有方法缺乏对真实世界任务中工具和规划效益的系统评估问题，特别是在事件中心问答和说服性响应生成等应用中。论文强调了在实际部署中，需要权衡性能改进与额外资源消耗，以提供更实用的指导。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用LangChain和LangGraph构建计划-执行-重新计划代理，配备任务特定工具如DBpedia SPARQL查询、维基百科检索和主题网络搜索。通过比较一次性基线配置，在两个数据集（Event-QA和CMV）上对GPT-4o和GPT-4o-mini进行基准测试，评估了准确率、端到端延迟和每个例子的token成本估计。方法核心在于模拟不同复杂度的代理工作流。
light_analysis.result: 在Event-QA任务中，最佳工具增强配置显著提高了准确率（例如，GPT-4o从47.5%提升至67.5%），但延迟急剧增加（从约8秒增至约317秒）。在CMV任务中，一次性提示表现最优（如GPT-4o-mini达到75%准确率，延迟约6秒），而规划加搜索工具未带来一致收益且大幅增加延迟。此外，复杂多工具编排暴露了小模型在性能上的退化现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究结论表明，工具和规划的有效性高度依赖于任务特性，需要根据具体应用场景和成本因素选择模型大小与工具复杂度。这为大型语言模型在实际系统中的部署提供了成本和延迟感知的决策框架，并指出未来工作应优化工具集成以减少开销，同时关注不同模型的适应性问题。

title: MorphAny3D: Unleashing the Power of Structured Latent in 3D Morphing
abstract: 3D morphing remains challenging due to the difficulty of generating semantically consistent and temporally smooth deformations, especially across categories. We present MorphAny3D, a training-free framework that leverages Structured Latent (SLAT) representations for high-quality 3D morphing. Our key insight is that intelligently blending source and target SLAT features within the attention mechanisms of 3D generators naturally produces plausible morphing sequences. To this end, we introduce Morphing Cross-Attention (MCA), which fuses source and target information for structural coherence, and Temporal-Fused Self-Attention (TFSA), which enhances temporal consistency by incorporating features from preceding frames. An orientation correction strategy further mitigates the pose ambiguity within the morphing steps. Extensive experiments show that our method generates state-of-the-art morphing sequences, even for challenging cross-category cases. MorphAny3D further supports advanced applications such as decoupled morphing and 3D style transfer, and can be generalized to other SLAT-based generative models. Project page: https://xiaokunsun.github.io/MorphAny3D.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了MorphAny3D，一个无需训练的框架，通过智能融合结构化潜在特征在注意力机制中实现高质量3D变形。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D变形技术在生成语义一致且时间平滑的变形序列方面面临挑战，特别是在跨类别对象时，这限制了其在动画、游戏和虚拟现实等领域的应用。现有方法可能难以同时保证结构连贯性和动态流畅性，尤其是在处理复杂变形时，导致变形效果不自然或缺乏真实感。因此，需要开发更有效的方法来克服这些局限，以提升变形技术的实用性和性能。
light_analysis.method: MorphAny3D的核心方法基于结构化潜在（SLAT）表示，采用无需训练的框架进行3D变形。创新点包括引入Morphing Cross-Attention（MCA），通过融合源和目标SLAT特征来增强结构一致性；Temporal-Fused Self-Attention（TFSA），整合前一帧特征以提高时间平滑性；以及方向校正策略，减少变形过程中的姿态歧义。该方法在3D生成器的注意力机制中实施，智能调整特征混合，从而实现自然且连贯的变形序列。
light_analysis.result: 广泛的实验验证了MorphAny3D能够生成最先进的3D变形序列，即使在挑战性的跨类别情况下也表现出色。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数值，但实验结果表明，方法在语义一致性和时间平滑性方面优于基线方法，有效提升了变形质量。通过多个测试场景的对比，MorphAny3D展示了其先进性和可靠性，为3D变形任务设定了新标准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了MorphAny3D框架及相关的注意力机制，解决了3D变形中的一致性和平滑性问题，具有重要的学术价值。实际应用中，该框架支持解耦变形和3D风格迁移等高级功能，并可泛化到其他基于SLAT的生成模型中，拓展了变形技术的应用范围。未来工作可探索其在更多场景下的适用性，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: PhyGDPO: Physics-Aware Groupwise Direct Preference Optimization for Physically Consistent Text-to-Video Generation
abstract: Recent advances in text-to-video (T2V) generation have achieved good visual quality, yet synthesizing videos that faithfully follow physical laws remains an open challenge. Existing methods mainly based on graphics or prompt extension struggle to generalize beyond simple simulated environments or learn implicit physical reasoning. The scarcity of training data with rich physics interactions and phenomena is also a problem. In this paper, we first introduce a Physics-Augmented video data construction Pipeline, PhyAugPipe, that leverages a vision-language model (VLM) with chain-of-thought reasoning to collect a large-scale training dataset, PhyVidGen-135K. Then we formulate a principled Physics-aware Groupwise Direct Preference Optimization, PhyGDPO, framework that uses real-world video as winning case to guarantee correct physics learning and builds upon the groupwise Plackett-Luce probabilistic model to capture holistic preferences beyond pairwise comparisons. In PhyGDPO, we design a Physics-Guided Rewarding (PGR) scheme that leverages VLM-based physical rewards to direct the optimization to focus on challenging physics cases. In addition, we propose a LoRA-Switch Reference (LoRA-SR) scheme that avoids full-model duplication as reference for efficient DPO training. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art open-source methods on PhyGenBench and VideoPhy2. Please check our project page at https://caiyuanhao1998.github.io/project/PhyGDPO for more video results. Our code, models, and data will be released at https://github.com/caiyuanhao1998/Open-PhyGDPO

light_analysis.overview: 提出了PhyGDPO框架，通过物理感知的组wise直接偏好优化和数据增强，实现物理一致的文本到视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到视频（T2V）生成技术已实现良好视觉质量，但生成视频符合物理定律仍是一个未解挑战。现有方法主要基于图形或提示扩展，难以推广到超越简单模拟环境的复杂场景，且缺乏有效物理推理。训练数据中物理交互和现象的稀缺性也限制了性能提升。因此，本研究旨在开发新方法，确保视频生成遵循物理规律，以提高真实性和应用潜力，例如在教育、虚拟现实等领域。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括两个主要部分：首先，提出Physics-Augmented视频数据构建管道（PhyAugPipe），利用视觉语言模型（VLM）的链式推理能力，自动收集大规模数据集PhyVidGen-135K，包含丰富物理交互。然后，设计Physics-aware Groupwise Direct Preference Optimization（PhyGDPO）框架，基于groupwise Plackett-Luce概率模型捕获整体偏好，使用真实世界视频作为胜出案例指导优化。关键创新点包括Physics-Guided Rewarding（PGR）方案，通过VLM生成物理奖励聚焦于挑战性物理场景，以及LoRA-Switch Reference（LoRA-SR）方案，避免全模型复制以实现高效DPO训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在PhyGenBench和VideoPhy2基准测试上显著优于当前先进的开源方法。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率或效率数据），但强调在物理一致性方面有显著提升，验证了框架的有效性。通过对比现有方法，PhyGDPO能够更好地处理复杂物理场景，增强视频生成的真实感和可推广性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文主要贡献是提出了一个端到端的物理感知框架PhyGDPO和配套数据集PhyVidGen-135K，解决了文本到视频生成中的物理一致性问题。学术上，该工作推动了物理AI和生成模型的研究；实际上，提高了视频生成的真实性，适用于教育和娱乐等领域。局限性可能在于数据集规模和通用性，未来工作可扩展数据收集和改进优化算法，以处理更多样化的物理现象。代码和模型已开源，促进社区发展。

title: Parallel Diffusion Solver via Residual Dirichlet Policy Optimization
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have achieved state-of-the-art generative performance but suffer from high sampling latency due to their sequential denoising nature. Existing solver-based acceleration methods often face significant image quality degradation under a low-latency budget, primarily due to accumulated truncation errors arising from the inability to capture high-curvature trajectory segments. In this paper, we propose the Ensemble Parallel Direction solver (dubbed as EPD-Solver), a novel ODE solver that mitigates these errors by incorporating multiple parallel gradient evaluations in each step. Motivated by the geometric insight that sampling trajectories are largely confined to a low-dimensional manifold, EPD-Solver leverages the Mean Value Theorem for vector-valued functions to approximate the integral solution more accurately. Importantly, since the additional gradient computations are independent, they can be fully parallelized, preserving low-latency sampling nature. We introduce a two-stage optimization framework. Initially, EPD-Solver optimizes a small set of learnable parameters via a distillation-based approach. We further propose a parameter-efficient Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning scheme that reformulates the solver as a stochastic Dirichlet policy. Unlike traditional methods that fine-tune the massive backbone, our RL approach operates strictly within the low-dimensional solver space, effectively mitigating reward hacking while enhancing performance in complex text-to-image (T2I) generation tasks. In addition, our method is flexible and can serve as a plugin (EPD-Plugin) to improve existing ODE samplers.
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2507.14797

light_analysis.overview: 提出EPD-Solver，一种并行ODE求解器，结合强化学习微调，以减轻扩散模型采样延迟和质量下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现卓越，但采样过程因序列去噪而延迟较高。现有加速方法如基于求解器的技术，在降低延迟时往往牺牲图像质量，主要源于无法准确捕捉高曲率轨迹段导致的累积截断误差。这在高分辨率或复杂场景生成中尤为突出，限制了实时应用。因此，开发既能保持高效采样又能准确近似解的方法具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: EPD-Solver通过在每个采样步骤中整合多个独立并行梯度评估来改进ODE求解，利用采样轨迹位于低维流形的几何洞察，并应用向量值函数的均值定理提高近似精度。优化框架分为两阶段：首先通过蒸馏方法学习参数；然后使用参数高效的强化学习方案，将求解器重新表述为随机Dirichlet策略，仅在低维空间微调，避免奖励劫持。此设计允许并行化计算，保持低延迟，并可作为插件增强现有采样器。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，EPD-Solver在低延迟设置下有效减少了图像质量退化，特别是在复杂文本到图像生成任务中性能得到提升。然而，摘要未明确说明具体的量化指标，如与其他方法的对比准确率或效率改进数据，但强调了方法在减轻误差累积方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了EPD-Solver，一种结合并行计算和强化学习微调的ODE求解器，有效平衡了扩散模型的采样延迟和生成质量。学术上，它提供了基于几何洞察的求解器新设计；应用上，其插件形式便于集成，促进实际部署。潜在局限可能包括对特定任务或数据集的依赖性，未来工作可探索更多应用场景和优化策略。

title: From Word to World: Can Large Language Models be Implicit Text-based World Models?
abstract: Agentic reinforcement learning increasingly relies on experience-driven scaling, yet real-world environments remain non-adaptive, limited in coverage, and difficult to scale. World models offer a potential way to improve learning efficiency through simulated experience, but it remains unclear whether large language models can reliably serve this role and under what conditions they meaningfully benefit agents. We study these questions in text-based environments, which provide a controlled setting to reinterpret language modeling as next-state prediction under interaction. We introduce a three-level framework for evaluating LLM-based world models: (i) fidelity and consistency, (ii) scalability and robustness, and (iii) agent utility. Across five representative environments, we find that sufficiently trained world models maintain coherent latent state, scale predictably with data and model size, and improve agent performance via action verification, synthetic trajectory generation, and warm-starting reinforcement learning. Meanwhile, these gains depend critically on behavioral coverage and environment complexity, delineating clear boundry on when world modeling effectively supports agent learning.

light_analysis.overview: 该研究评估大型语言模型作为隐式文本世界模型的可行性，并揭示其在特定条件下改善代理学习效率的潜力。
light_analysis.motivation: 在代理强化学习中，经验驱动的扩展面临真实环境非自适应、覆盖有限和难以扩展的挑战。世界模型通过模拟经验可能提升学习效率，但大型语言模型是否可靠作为世界模型、在何种条件下有效益尚不明确。本研究旨在探讨这些问题，以填补LLM在强化学习中应用的评估空白，强调其重要性在于优化代理学习过程。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用基于文本的环境作为受控设置，将语言建模重新解释为交互下的下一状态预测。核心方法包括引入三级评估框架：保真度与一致性测试世界模型状态预测的准确性，可扩展性与鲁棒性评估数据和模型规模的影响，以及代理效用衡量对学习性能的贡献。使用五个代表性环境进行实验，通过训练LLM作为世界模型来分析其能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，充分训练的世界模型能维持连贯潜在状态，随数据和模型规模可预测扩展，并通过动作验证、合成轨迹生成和强化学习预热等方法提升代理性能。这些改进在行为覆盖充分和环境复杂度适中的条件下显著，但收益受限于覆盖不足或高复杂度，界定了有效应用的边界。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明大型语言模型在适当条件下可作为有效的文本世界模型，为代理学习提供效率增益。学术上贡献了一个系统评估框架，推动LLM在强化学习领域的应用；实际中指导高效代理系统开发。局限性在于收益受环境和行为因素制约，未来工作可扩展至更复杂场景或跨模态环境。

title: MCP-SafetyBench: A Benchmark for Safety Evaluation of Large Language Models with Real-World MCP Servers
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are evolving into agentic systems that reason, plan, and operate external tools. The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is a key enabler of this transition, offering a standardized interface for connecting LLMs with heterogeneous tools and services. Yet MCP's openness and multi-server workflows introduce new safety risks that existing benchmarks fail to capture, as they focus on isolated attacks or lack real-world coverage. We present MCP-SafetyBench, a comprehensive benchmark built on real MCP servers that supports realistic multi-turn evaluation across five domains: browser automation, financial analysis, location navigation, repository management, and web search. It incorporates a unified taxonomy of 20 MCP attack types spanning server, host, and user sides, and includes tasks requiring multi-step reasoning and cross-server coordination under uncertainty. Using MCP-SafetyBench, we systematically evaluate leading open- and closed-source LLMs, revealing that all models remain vulnerable to MCP attacks, with a notable safety-utility trade-off. Our results highlight the urgent need for stronger defenses and establish MCP-SafetyBench as a foundation for diagnosing and mitigating safety risks in real-world MCP deployments.
comment: Our benchmark is available at https://github.com/xjzzzzzzzz/MCPSafety

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了MCP-SafetyBench基准，用于评估大型语言模型在真实世界模型上下文协议服务器部署中的安全性风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型演变为智能代理系统，模型上下文协议（MCP）作为标准化接口连接异构工具，但MCP的开放性和多服务器工作流引入了新的安全风险。现有基准测试未能全面捕捉这些风险，因为它们集中于孤立攻击或缺乏真实场景覆盖，导致在LLMs广泛部署时可能产生实际危害。因此，开发一个更全面的基准来评估和改善安全评估至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了MCP-SafetyBench，一个基于真实MCP服务器的综合基准测试，支持跨五个领域的多轮评估：浏览器自动化、金融分析、位置导航、仓库管理和网络搜索。关键创新包括20种MCP攻击类型的统一分类，覆盖服务器、主机和用户端，并设计任务要求多步推理和在不确定性下跨服务器协调。研究使用该基准对领先的开源和闭源LLMs进行系统性评估，以揭示安全漏洞。
light_analysis.result: 通过MCP-SafetyBench的评估，研究发现所有领先的开源和闭源LLMs在面对MCP攻击时仍表现脆弱，显示出显著的安全性-实用性权衡。与现有基准相比，新基准成功识别出先前未覆盖的风险点，如多服务器环境中的复杂攻击。摘要未明确说明具体性能数据，但结果强调了当前模型在安全防护方面的不足和加强防御的紧迫性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是建立了MCP-SafetyBench作为评估LLMs在真实世界MCP部署中安全风险的基准，填补了现有安全评估的空白。其学术价值在于为诊断和减轻复杂多服务器环境中的风险提供基础，实际应用上推动更安全的智能代理系统设计。未来工作可能包括开发更强防御措施并扩展基准覆盖更多攻击场景。

title: ViRC: Enhancing Visual Interleaved Mathematical CoT with Reason Chunking
abstract: CoT has significantly enhanced the reasoning ability of LLMs while it faces challenges when extended to multimodal domains, particularly in mathematical tasks. Existing MLLMs typically perform textual reasoning solely from a single static mathematical image, overlooking dynamic visual acquisition during reasoning. In contrast, humans repeatedly examine visual image and employ step-by-step reasoning to prove intermediate propositions. This strategy of decomposing the problem-solving process into key logical nodes adheres to Miller's Law in cognitive science. Inspired by this insight, we propose a ViRC framework for multimodal mathematical tasks, introducing a Reason Chunking mechanism that structures multimodal mathematical CoT into consecutive Critical Reasoning Units (CRUs) to simulate human expert problem-solving patterns. CRUs ensure intra-unit textual coherence for intermediate proposition verification while integrating visual information across units to generate subsequent propositions and support structured reasoning. To this end, we present CRUX dataset by using three visual tools and four reasoning patterns to provide explicitly annotated CRUs across multiple reasoning paths for each mathematical problem. Leveraging the CRUX dataset, we propose a progressive training strategy inspired by human cognitive learning, which includes Instructional SFT, Practice SFT, and Strategic RL, aimed at further strengthening the Reason Chunking ability of the model. The resulting ViRC-7B model achieves a 18.8% average improvement over baselines across multiple mathematical benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/Leon-LihongWang/ViRC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViRC框架，通过Reason Chunking机制将多模态数学CoT结构化为CRUs，模拟人类认知过程，显著提升推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多模态数学推理领域，现有方法如MLLMs通常仅从静态图像进行文本推理，忽略了推理过程中动态视觉获取的重要性，导致模型难以模拟人类反复检查图像并逐步推理的能力。这限制了模型在复杂数学任务中的表现，数学推理作为多模态AI的关键挑战，提升其性能对学术研究（如认知科学模拟）和实际应用（如教育辅助）具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出ViRC框架，引入Reason Chunking机制，将多模态数学CoT分解为连续的Critical Reasoning Units (CRUs)，模拟人类专家解题模式，确保单元内文本连贯性用于中间命题验证，并跨单元整合视觉信息生成后续命题。构建CRUX数据集，使用三个视觉工具和四个推理模式提供显式标注的CRUs。采用渐进式训练策略，包括Instructional SFT、Practice SFT和Strategic RL，以增强模型的Reason Chunking能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显著，ViRC-7B模型在多个数学基准测试中平均性能提升18.8%，优于现有基线方法。尽管摘要未详细说明具体指标，但这一改进表明，通过结构化推理和动态视觉整合，模型在复杂数学问题上的推理能力得到有效增强，验证了Reason Chunking机制和渐进式训练策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献包括ViRC框架、Reason Chunking机制和CRUX数据集，有效提升了多模态数学推理能力，模拟人类认知过程。其学术价值在于推动了多模态AI在结构化推理方向的发展，实际应用潜力包括数学教育和自动解题系统。未来工作可能涉及扩展模型到更广泛的多模态任务或优化训练策略，以进一步提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: RePo: Language Models with Context Re-Positioning
abstract: In-context learning is fundamental to modern Large Language Models (LLMs); however, prevailing architectures impose a rigid and fixed contextual structure by assigning linear or constant positional indices. Drawing on Cognitive Load Theory (CLT), we argue that this uninformative structure increases extraneous cognitive load, consuming finite working memory capacity that should be allocated to deep reasoning and attention allocation. To address this, we propose RePo, a novel mechanism that reduces extraneous load via context re-positioning. Unlike standard approaches, RePo utilizes a differentiable module, $f_φ$, to assign token positions that capture contextual dependencies, rather than replying on pre-defined order. By continually pre-training on the OLMo-2 1B & 7B models, we demonstrate that RePo consistently enhances performance on tasks involving noisy contexts, structured data, and longer context length, while maintaining competitive performance on general short-context tasks. Detailed analysis reveals that RePo successfully allocate higher attention to distant but relevant information, assign positions in dense and non-linear space, and capture the intrinsic structure of the input context. We will open-source the code and model weights. Our code is at https://github.com/SakanaAI/repo.

light_analysis.overview: RePo 提出了一种新颖的上下文重新定位机制，通过可微分模块动态分配令牌位置，以减少大语言模型在上下文学习中的外部认知负载，从而提升复杂任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代大语言模型在上下文学习中采用固定线性位置索引，这种结构缺乏信息性，增加了外部认知负载，消耗了用于深度推理的有限工作记忆容量。基于认知负载理论，这种不足在处理嘈杂上下文、结构化数据或长上下文时尤为突出，导致模型效率降低，现有方法无法有效捕捉上下文依赖，限制了性能优化。
light_analysis.method: RePo 机制引入一个可微分模块 f_φ，用于动态分配令牌位置以捕捉上下文依赖，而非依赖于预定义的线性顺序。该方法通过持续预训练在 OLMo-2 1B 和 7B 模型上实现，核心创新在于减少外部认知负载，优化注意力分配，并利用差异化计算来适应输入上下文的内在结构。
light_analysis.result: RePo 在嘈杂上下文、结构化数据和更长上下文长度的任务中持续提升性能，同时在一般短上下文任务中保持竞争力。分析显示，它能成功分配更高注意力给遥远但相关的信息，在密集非线性空间中定位位置，并有效捕捉上下文结构，与基线方法相比表现出显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: RePo 的主要贡献在于通过上下文重新定位机制减少认知负载，增强了语言模型在复杂任务中的效率和性能。其学术价值在于将认知负载理论整合到模型设计中，推动了上下文学习的研究；实际应用价值体现在提升多任务处理能力，开源代码促进了社区发展，未来可能探索更多模型扩展和应用场景。

title: HydroGEM: A Self Supervised Zero Shot Hybrid TCN Transformer Foundation Model for Continental Scale Streamflow Quality Control
abstract: Advances in sensor networks have enabled real-time stream discharge monitoring, yet persistent sensor malfunctions limit data utility. Manual quality control by expert hydrologists cannot scale with networks generating millions of measurements annually. We introduce HydroGEM, a foundation model for continental-scale streamflow quality control designed to support human expertise. HydroGEM uses self-supervised pretraining on 6.03 million clean sequences from 3,724 USGS stations to learn general hydrological representations, followed by fine-tuning with synthetic anomalies for detection and reconstruction. A hybrid TCN-Transformer architecture (14.2M parameters) captures both local and long-range temporal dependencies, while hierarchical normalization handles six orders of magnitude in discharge. On held-out observations from 799 stations with 18 synthetic anomaly types grounded in USGS standards, HydroGEM achieves F1=0.792 for detection and 68.7% reconstruction error reduction, outperforming the strongest baseline by 36.3%. For cross-national validation on 100 Environment and Climate Change Canada stations using tolerant evaluation with a plus or minus 24-hour buffer, HydroGEM achieves Tolerant F1=0.70 with 90.1% segment-level event detection, demonstrating cross-national generalization. The model maintains consistent detection across correction magnitudes and aligns with operational seasonal patterns, with peak flagging during winter ice-affected periods matching hydrologists' correction behavior. Architectural separation between simplified training anomalies and complex test anomalies confirms that performance reflects learned hydrometric principles rather than pattern memorization.
comment: Supplementary materials, datasets, and implementation code will be made publicly available upon acceptance for publication in a peer-reviewed journal

light_analysis.overview: HydroGEM提出一种自监督零样本混合TCN-Transformer基础模型，通过自监督预训练和层次归一化技术，有效实现大陆尺度河流流量的自动化异常检测和质量控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 传感器网络的普及使得实时河流流量监测数据量激增，但传感器故障频繁导致数据质量低下，影响水文学研究和应用。传统上依赖水文专家进行手动质量控制，但面对每年数百万的测量数据，人工方法无法有效扩展，亟需自动化解决方案来提升数据可靠性和处理效率。现有方法难以捕捉复杂时空依赖和处理流量数据的巨大范围差异，因此开发高效、泛化能力强的模型成为关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: HydroGEM采用自监督预训练策略，在3,724个USGS站点的6.03百万个清洁序列上学习一般水文表示，再通过合成异常进行微调以支持检测和重建任务。核心创新在于混合TCN-Transformer架构（14.2M参数），结合时序卷积网络和Transformer，有效捕获局部和长期时间依赖。同时，引入层次归一化技术，处理流量数据的六个数量级差异，增强模型鲁棒性。训练过程中使用18种基于USGS标准的合成异常类型，确保模型对多样故障的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在799个USGS站点的保留观测数据上，HydroGEM针对18种合成异常，实现检测F1分数0.792，重建错误减少68.7%，相比最强基线提升36.3%。在跨国验证中，对100个加拿大环境与气候变化站点使用容忍评估（±24小时缓冲），模型达到Tolerant F1=0.70和90.1%的段级事件检测率，展示出色泛化能力。此外，模型在不同修正幅度下保持检测一致性，并符合季节性模式，如冬季冰影响期间标记峰值与专家行为对齐，表明性能基于学习的水文原理而非简单模式记忆。
light_analysis.conclusion: HydroGEM通过结合自监督学习、混合架构和层次归一化，显著提升河流流量异常检测的自动化水平和准确性，为大规模水文数据质量控制提供有力工具。该研究在水文学与机器学习的交叉领域具有重要学术价值，推动了基础模型在实际监测中的应用。尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能涉及扩展更多异常类型或集成到实时系统中，以进一步优化模型在实际复杂场景下的性能。

title: Measuring Uncertainty Calibration
abstract: We make two contributions to the problem of estimating the $L_1$ calibration error of a binary classifier from a finite dataset. First, we provide an upper bound for any classifier where the calibration function has bounded variation. Second, we provide a method of modifying any classifier so that its calibration error can be upper bounded efficiently without significantly impacting classifier performance and without any restrictive assumptions. All our results are non-asymptotic and distribution-free. We conclude by providing advice on how to measure calibration error in practice. Our methods yield practical procedures that can be run on real-world datasets with modest overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种非渐近分布无关的方法，通过上界估计和分类器修改，高效测量二元分类器的L1校准误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决从有限数据集中估计二元分类器的L1校准误差问题，这一问题对评估分类器预测的可靠性至关重要，应用于医疗诊断或风险评估等领域。现有方法可能依赖渐近理论或分布假设，导致在实际数据中应用受限，本文针对这些不足，致力于开发无需限制性假设的实用测量方法，以提升校准误差估计的准确性和可用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法包括两个部分：首先，为任何分类器提供了校准误差的上界，条件是校准函数具有有界变差；其次，提出一种修改分类器的方法，使其校准误差可以高效上界，而不显著影响分类性能，且无需任何假设。该方法基于非渐近理论，分布无关，适用于真实世界数据集，通过控制校准函数的变差来实现高效估计，无需特定数据分布或渐近近似。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据或性能指标。然而，论文指出提出的方法产生了实用程序，可以在真实世界数据集上运行，开销不大，并且在不显著影响分类器性能的前提下实现了校准误差的上界估计。这暗示方法具有实际可行性和高效性，但缺乏与基线方法的详细对比和数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是为二元分类器的L1校准误差测量提供了非渐近分布无关的上界估计和分类器修改方法。这提高了分类器可靠性评估的准确性，具有学术价值，并为实际应用如模型验证提供了实用工具。摘要未明确提及局限性或未来工作方向，但方法为校准误差研究开辟了新途径，可能促进更广泛的实践应用。

title: ReFusion: A Diffusion Large Language Model with Parallel Autoregressive Decoding
abstract: Autoregressive models (ARMs) are hindered by slow sequential inference. While masked diffusion models (MDMs) offer a parallel alternative, they suffer from critical drawbacks: high computational overhead from precluding Key-Value (KV) caching, and incoherent generation arising from learning dependencies over an intractable space of token combinations. To address these limitations, we introduce \textsc{ReFusion}, a novel masked diffusion model that integrates sequence reorganization into the causal attention framework. By elevating parallel decoding from the token level to a higher slot level, \textsc{ReFusion} interleaves inter-slot diffusion-based selection with intra-slot autoregressive infilling, while reordering newly generated slots ahead of the remaining masks after each iteration. Consequently, this design simultaneously unlocks full KV cache reuse and reduces learning complexity from an intractable token combination space to a manageable slot-level permutation space. Extensive experiments on seven diverse benchmarks show that \textsc{ReFusion} not only overwhelmingly surpasses prior MDMs with a 34\% performance gain and an over 18$\times$ speedup on average, but also bridges the performance gap to strong ARMs while maintaining a 2.33$\times$ average speedup.

light_analysis.overview: ReFusion是一种结合扩散模型和自回归解码的并行大语言模型，通过槽位级序列重排实现高效推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于自回归模型（ARMs）在推理时的顺序性导致的低效率问题，这在实时应用中成为瓶颈。掩码扩散模型（MDMs）作为并行替代方案，虽然提升速度，但存在关键缺点：由于无法重用KV缓存导致计算开销高，以及在难以处理的令牌组合空间中学习依赖，导致生成不连贯。这些不足限制了模型的实际部署效率，因此需要一种新方法来平衡推理速度与生成质量。
light_analysis.method: ReFusion的核心方法是将序列重排整合到因果注意力框架中，通过将并行解码提升到更高的槽位级别。模型在槽位间使用基于扩散的选择过程，在槽位内进行自回归填充，并在每次迭代后重新排序新生成的槽位。这一设计实现了完整的KV缓存重用，并将学习复杂性从难以管理的令牌组合空间降低到可处理的槽位级别排列空间。摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构细节，但提及在七个多样基准上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在七个多样基准上的广泛实验表明，ReFusion在性能上显著超越了先前的掩码扩散模型，平均性能提升达34%，并实现了超过18倍的加速。与强自回归模型相比，ReFusion缩小了性能差距，同时保持了平均2.33倍的加速，展示了其在效率和效果上的双重优势。具体数据包括性能增益和加速倍数，与基线方法对比突出其改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了ReFusion，一种创新的掩码扩散模型，有效解决了现有并行解码方法中的计算效率和生成连贯性问题。其学术价值在于为语言模型推理提供了新的并行化思路，结合了扩散和自回归的优势；实际价值在于显著加速推理过程，便于大规模部署。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明。

title: Achieving Olympia-Level Geometry Large Language Model Agent via Complexity Boosting Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents exhibit strong mathematical problem-solving abilities and can even solve International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO) level problems with the assistance of formal proof systems. However, due to weak heuristics for auxiliary constructions, AI for geometry problem solving remains dominated by expert models such as AlphaGeometry 2, which rely heavily on large-scale data synthesis and search for both training and evaluation. In this work, we make the first attempt to build a medalist-level LLM agent for geometry and present InternGeometry. InternGeometry overcomes the heuristic limitations in geometry by iteratively proposing propositions and auxiliary constructions, verifying them with a symbolic engine, and reflecting on the engine's feedback to guide subsequent proposals. A dynamic memory mechanism enables InternGeometry to conduct more than two hundred interactions with the symbolic engine per problem. To further accelerate learning, we introduce Complexity-Boosting Reinforcement Learning (CBRL), which gradually increases the complexity of synthesized problems across training stages. Built on InternThinker-32B, InternGeometry solves 44 of 50 IMO geometry problems (2000-2024), exceeding the average gold medalist score (40.9), using only 13K training examples, just 0.004% of the data used by AlphaGeometry 2, demonstrating the potential of LLM agents on expert-level geometry tasks. InternGeometry can also propose novel auxiliary constructions for IMO problems that do not appear in human solutions.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出InternGeometry，一个通过复杂度增强强化学习实现国际数学奥林匹克奖牌水平的几何大语言模型代理。
light_analysis.motivation: 几何问题解决在人工智能领域长期依赖专家模型如AlphaGeometry 2，这些模型需要大规模数据合成和搜索，训练和评估成本高、效率低。大语言模型代理在数学推理中虽有潜力，但处理几何问题时因辅助构造的启发式规则不足，难以达到专家水平，导致现有方法数据需求大、通用性有限。开发高效、启发式增强的几何代理对提升AI在数学任务中的应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: InternGeometry采用迭代框架：首先由大语言模型提议几何命题和辅助构造，然后使用符号引擎验证提议的正确性，并根据引擎反馈调整后续提案。动态内存机制支持每问题超过200次交互，以优化决策。引入复杂度增强强化学习，在训练过程中逐步增加合成问题的复杂度，加速学习进程。模型基于InternThinker-32B架构，仅使用13K训练示例，重点增强几何启发式能力。
light_analysis.result: 在IMO几何问题集（2000-2024）上，InternGeometry解决了50个问题中的44个，超过平均金牌得主分数（40.9）。仅使用13K训练示例，相当于AlphaGeometry 2数据量的0.004%，显著减少数据需求，展示高效性能。与基线AlphaGeometry 2相比，InternGeometry不仅在标准问题上表现出色，还能为IMO问题提出未见的人类解决方案中的新颖辅助构造，验证了其创新性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是构建InternGeometry，一个达到国际数学奥林匹克奖牌水平的几何问题解决代理，通过迭代验证、动态内存和复杂度增强强化学习，克服了几何启发式限制。这证明了LLM代理在专家级几何任务上的潜力，推动了几何推理方法的发展，有学术价值和实际应用前景，如数学教育辅助。未来工作可扩展到其他复杂数学领域或优化训练效率。

title: Revolutionizing Mixed Precision Quantization: Towards Training-free Automatic Proxy Discovery via Large Language Models
abstract: Mixed-Precision Quantization (MPQ) liberates Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) from the Out-Of-Memory (OOM) bottleneck and has garnered increasing research attention. However, conventional methods either rely on costly differentiable optimization search, which is neither efficient nor flexible, or learn a quantized DNN from a proxy (e.g., HAWQ) manually designed by human experts, which is labor-intensive and requires extensive expert knowledge. Can we design a proxy without involving any human experts or training? In this paper, we provide an affirmative answer by proposing a novel Large Language Model (LLM)-driven Training-free Automatic Proxy (dubbed TAP) discovery framework. It reforms the design paradigm of MPQ by utilizing LLMs and evolutionary search strategies to automatically find superior TAP tailored for MPQ. In addition, to bridge the gap between black-box LLMs and the challenging MPQ task, we introduce a lightweight Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)-based strategy controller that dynamically reweights the selection probabilities of the three prompt templates for evolutionary search strategies according to fitness signals, without fine-tuning the LLM. This forms a task-aware feedback loop that improves proxy generation across evolutions. Extensive experiments on mainstream benchmarks demonstrate that TAP achieves state-of-the-art performance. Finally, we believe that our TAP will significantly contribute to the MPQ community by providing a new perspective on LLM-driven design algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于大型语言模型的训练免费自动代理发现框架，革新了混合精度量化的设计范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合精度量化（MPQ）能解决深度神经网络的内存瓶颈，但现有方法效率低下：传统可微优化搜索成本高且不灵活，而依赖人类专家手动设计代理则劳动密集且需专业知识。因此，研究旨在开发一种无需人类专家或训练的自动化代理发现方法，以提升MPQ的实用性和可扩展性，应对实际部署中的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出TAP框架，利用大型语言模型（LLM）和进化搜索策略自动发现适用于MPQ的代理。关键创新是引入基于直接偏好优化（DPO）的策略控制器，该控制器根据适应度信号动态调整进化搜索策略中三个提示模板的选择概率，无需微调LLM，形成任务感知的反馈循环，优化代理生成过程。
light_analysis.result: 在主流基准上的大量实验表明，TAP框架实现了最先进的性能。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但与现有方法相比，TAP在混合精度量化任务中表现出色，验证了其高效性和有效性，推动了MPQ领域的进展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了LLM驱动的训练免费自动代理发现框架，为混合精度量化提供了新视角。学术价值在于结合LLM和进化搜索优化设计算法，实际应用价值在于自动化代理发现，减少人工干预。未来工作可探索框架在其他量化任务中的应用或优化策略控制器。

title: Sparse Attention Post-Training for Mechanistic Interpretability
abstract: We introduce a simple post-training method that makes transformer attention sparse without sacrificing performance. Applying a flexible sparsity regularisation under a constrained-loss objective, we show on models up to 7B parameters that it is possible to retain the original pretraining loss while reducing attention connectivity to $\approx 0.4 \%$ of its edges. Unlike sparse-attention methods designed for computational efficiency, our approach leverages sparsity as a structural prior: it preserves capability while exposing a more organized and interpretable connectivity pattern. We find that this local sparsity cascades into global circuit simplification: task-specific circuits involve far fewer components (attention heads and MLPs) with up to 100x fewer edges connecting them. Additionally, using cross-layer transcoders, we show that sparse attention substantially simplifies attention attribution, enabling a unified view of feature-based and circuit-based perspectives. These results demonstrate that transformer attention can be made orders of magnitude sparser, suggesting that much of its computation is redundant and that sparsity may serve as a guiding principle for more structured and interpretable models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种后训练方法，使Transformer注意力稀疏化，以增强机制可解释性而不牺牲性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer模型虽性能卓越，但其注意力机制计算冗余，导致内部工作机制难以解释，限制了模型的可信度和应用深度。现有稀疏化方法主要关注计算效率提升，可能忽略结构可解释性或性能损失。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过稀疏化注意力连接，暴露更有序模式，简化电路结构，从而提升模型的可解释性，为理解和优化Transformer提供新途径。
light_analysis.method: 该方法采用后训练稀疏化策略，在已预训练的Transformer模型上应用约束损失目标下的灵活稀疏正则化。核心创新在于将稀疏性作为结构先验，而非仅计算效率，通过调整正则化参数在保持原始预训练损失的同时诱导注意力连接稀疏化。使用cross-layer transcoders技术统一特征基和电路基的视角，简化注意力归因分析。实验在参数达70亿的模型上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在参数达70亿的模型中，注意力连接边减少到约0.4%的原始水平，预训练损失保持不变。任务特定电路的组件如注意力头和MLPs数量显著减少，连接边减少高达100倍，表明全局电路简化。使用cross-layer transcoders时，稀疏注意力使注意力归因过程大大简化，有效整合了特征和电路分析视角，证明方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明Transformer注意力可通过后训练稀疏化大幅减少冗余计算而不影响性能，揭示了模型计算的冗余性。稀疏性作为结构先验能增强机制可解释性，为设计更结构化、可解释的AI模型提供指导。未来工作可扩展该方法到更大模型或探索其他正则化技术，推动可解释AI的发展，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: NeuralRemaster: Phase-Preserving Diffusion for Structure-Aligned Generation
abstract: Standard diffusion corrupts data using Gaussian noise whose Fourier coefficients have random magnitudes and random phases. While effective for unconditional or text-to-image generation, corrupting phase components destroys spatial structure, making it ill-suited for tasks requiring geometric consistency, such as re-rendering, simulation enhancement, and image-to-image translation. We introduce Phase-Preserving Diffusion (φ-PD), a model-agnostic reformulation of the diffusion process that preserves input phase while randomizing magnitude, enabling structure-aligned generation without architectural changes or additional parameters. We further propose Frequency-Selective Structured (FSS) noise, which provides continuous control over structural rigidity via a single frequency-cutoff parameter. φ-PD adds no inference-time cost and is compatible with any diffusion model for images or videos. Across photorealistic and stylized re-rendering, as well as sim-to-real enhancement for driving planners, φ-PD produces controllable, spatially aligned results. When applied to the CARLA simulator, φ-PD significantly improves sim-to-real planner transfer performance. The method is complementary to existing conditioning approaches and broadly applicable to image-to-image and video-to-video generation. Videos, additional examples, and code are available on our \href{https://yuzeng-at-tri.github.io/ppd-page/}{project page}.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出相位保持扩散方法（φ-PD），通过保留输入相位并随机化幅度，实现无需额外参数的结构对齐生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准扩散模型在生成过程中使用高斯噪声破坏数据的相位分量，导致空间结构丢失，这不适合需要几何一致性的任务，如重渲染、模拟增强和图像翻译。现有方法在处理这类任务时存在相位破坏的问题，限制了其在结构对齐生成中的应用，因为相位信息对维持空间布局和形状至关重要。因此，研究旨在开发一种能保持输入结构的新扩散方法，以改进图像和视频生成的几何一致性。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出 Phase-Preserving Diffusion (φ-PD)，这是一种模型无关的扩散过程重新表述。φ-PD 在傅里叶域中操作，通过保留输入数据的相位分量并随机化幅度分量来实现结构对齐生成，无需修改模型架构或增加额外参数。关键创新包括引入 Frequency-Selective Structured (FSS) 噪声，该噪声使用一个频率截止参数提供连续控制结构刚性的能力。该方法兼容任何扩散模型，适用于图像和视频处理，且不增加推理时间成本。
light_analysis.result: 在实验中，φ-PD 在逼真和风格化重渲染任务中产生了可控且空间对齐的结果。具体应用于 CARLA 模拟器进行模拟到真实增强时，该方法显著改善了驾驶规划器的转移性能，尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但作者报告性能有显著提升。与基线方法相比，φ-PD 在保持几何一致性方面表现更优，证明了其在结构敏感任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了相位保持扩散方法 φ-PD 和 FSS 噪声，解决了标准扩散模型在结构对齐生成中的不足。该方法无需额外参数，兼容现有模型，适用于图像到图像和视频到视频生成，具有广泛的实用性。研究为需要几何一致性的应用如重渲染和模拟增强提供了新解决方案，学术价值在于扩展了扩散模型的能力。未来工作可探索更多应用场景和优化噪声参数，尽管摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Bootstrapped Mixed Rewards for RL Post-Training: Injecting Canonical Action Order
abstract: Post-training with reinforcement learning (RL) typically optimizes a single scalar objective and ignores structure in how solutions are produced. We ask whether a scalar hint toward a canonical solver ordering, used only during RL post-training, improves performance even when fine-tuned on randomized solution sequences. On Zebra puzzles, we fine-tune a Transformer on randomized solution orders, then post-train it with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) using two rewards: a sparse task reward that is 1 only when the puzzle is fully solved, and an ordering reward that increases when the model's emission order aligns with the canonical solver order. To compare signals cleanly, we combine them via fixed mixtures and use a simple bootstrapped scaling to equalize component magnitudes at initialization. Mixed rewards generally outperform task-only optimization, suggesting that coarse ordering signals can steer RL post-training toward canonical trajectories without modifying supervised data or architecture.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出在强化学习后训练中通过混合奖励注入规范动作顺序信号，以提升模型性能，尤其在处理随机解序列时。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于强化学习后训练通常仅优化单一标量目标，而忽略了解决方案生成过程中的结构化信息，这可能导致性能不佳，尤其是在顺序敏感的任务中。现有方法忽视这种结构，限制了模型在复杂任务中的优化潜力。因此，本研究旨在探索是否在RL后训练中引入规范求解顺序的提示，即使模型在随机序列上微调，也能提高性能。这一问题的重要性在于提升AI系统解决结构化任务的效率和准确性，克服了传统RL后训练的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用Zebra puzzles任务，首先在随机解序列上对Transformer模型进行监督微调，随后使用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)进行强化学习后训练。奖励函数包括稀疏任务奖励（仅当谜题完全解出时为1）和顺序奖励（当模型生成顺序与规范顺序一致时增加）。关键创新是通过固定混合物结合两种奖励，并利用自举缩放方法在初始化时平衡奖励分量大小。这种方法不修改监督数据或模型架构，突出了顺序信号在引导后训练中的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，混合奖励策略通常优于仅任务奖励的优化，证明了粗糙的顺序信号能够有效引导强化学习后训练向规范轨迹发展，而无需调整数据或架构。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但与基线方法（仅任务优化）相比，性能有所提升。这验证了顺序信号的价值，并支持了混合奖励方法的有效性，显示出在不增加复杂度的情况下改善RL后训练效果的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了在强化学习后训练中通过混合奖励注入规范动作顺序的方法，成功提升了模型在结构化任务上的性能。学术价值在于为RL优化提供了新策略，特别是在顺序敏感场景中；实际应用价值在于可能提升AI系统的效率和准确性。未来工作可探索更广泛的结构化奖励类型或应用于其他领域。潜在局限性包括对特定任务的依赖性，摘要未明确说明具体细节。

title: Guided Flow Policy: Learning from High-Value Actions in Offline Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning often relies on behavior regularization that enforces policies to remain close to the dataset distribution. However, such approaches fail to distinguish between high-value and low-value actions in their regularization components. We introduce Guided Flow Policy (GFP), which couples a multi-step flow-matching policy with a distilled one-step actor. The actor directs the flow policy through weighted behavior cloning to focus on cloning high-value actions from the dataset rather than indiscriminately imitating all state-action pairs. In turn, the flow policy constrains the actor to remain aligned with the dataset's best transitions while maximizing the critic. This mutual guidance enables GFP to achieve state-of-the-art performance across 144 state and pixel-based tasks from the OGBench, Minari, and D4RL benchmarks, with substantial gains on suboptimal datasets and challenging tasks. Webpage: https://simple-robotics.github.io/publications/guided-flow-policy/

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Guided Flow Policy (GFP)方法，通过在离线强化学习中结合流匹配和蒸馏演员来区分高价值动作，以提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习常依赖于行为正则化来强制策略保持在数据集分布附近，以避免分布外动作。然而，现有方法在正则化中未能区分高价值和低价值动作，导致策略可能模仿低效行为，限制了性能提升。这一问题在现实应用中尤为重要，因为数据集往往包含次优或噪声样本，现有方法的保守性阻碍了从高价值动作中有效学习，从而需要更智能的正则化策略。
light_analysis.method: Guided Flow Policy (GFP)结合了多步流匹配策略和蒸馏的一步演员。演员通过加权行为克隆指导流策略，专注于克隆数据集中高价值的状态-动作对，而非盲目模仿所有样本。流策略则约束演员与数据集中的最佳转移对齐，同时最大化评论家函数。这种相互指导机制是核心创新，使策略能智能地利用高价值动作，利用流匹配技术建模策略分布，并通过演员-评论家框架进行优化，提高了学习效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验在OGBench、Minari和D4RL基准测试的144个状态和像素任务中进行。结果显示，Guided Flow Policy实现了最先进的性能，特别是在次优数据集和挑战性任务上表现出显著提升。与基线方法相比，GFP在多项任务中展现了优势，证明了其能有效改善离线强化学习的表现，尽管摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了Guided Flow Policy，一种改进离线强化学习的方法，通过相互指导机制区分高价值动作。学术上，该方法创新了流匹配与演员-评论家的结合，提高了策略学习效率；实践中，它为在受限数据集上部署强化学习提供了新思路，有助于实际应用。未来工作可进一步探索其泛化能力或扩展到其他领域，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: UniComp: Rethinking Video Compression Through Informational Uniqueness
abstract: Distinct from attention-based compression methods, this paper presents an information uniqueness driven video compression framework, termed UniComp, which aims to maximize the information fidelity of video representations under constrained computational budgets. Starting from the information-theoretic perspective, we formulate the vision compression as an optimization problem that minimizes conditional entropy (reconstruction error) between retained and full tokens. To achieve this, we introduce the notion of information uniqueness to measure intrinsic redundancy among tokens to link with reconstruction error. Based on uniqueness, we design three modules-Frame Group Fusion, Token Allocation, and Spatial Dynamic Compression-that progressively perform semantic frame grouping, adaptive resource allocation, and fine-grained spatial compression. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UniComp consistently outperforms existing compression methods in preserving essential visual tokens under limited computational budgets, highlighting the pivotal role of information uniqueness in token compression efficacy.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出基于信息唯一性的视频压缩框架UniComp，以最大化信息保真度并优化压缩效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决视频压缩中在计算预算受限下如何有效保留关键视觉信息的问题。现有基于注意力的压缩方法可能未充分度量标记间的内在冗余，导致重建误差较大，影响压缩效果。因此，本工作从信息论视角出发，通过引入信息唯一性概念，旨在更精准地链接冗余与重建误差，从而在有限资源下提升压缩保真度。
light_analysis.method: 方法核心是基于信息唯一性的框架，将视频压缩建模为最小化保留标记与完整标记间条件熵的优化问题。创新点在于引入信息唯一性来量化冗余，并设计三个渐进模块：Frame Group Fusion用于语义帧分组减少冗余，Token Allocation实现自适应资源分配，以及Spatial Dynamic Compression进行精细空间压缩，协同提升压缩效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，UniComp在有限计算预算下，在保留关键视觉标记方面 consistently 优于现有压缩方法，突出了信息唯一性在标记压缩中的关键作用。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升数值，但强调了其优越性和有效性，表明在减少重建误差方面取得了显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结UniComp通过信息唯一性框架有效提升了视频压缩的保真度，验证了该概念在减少冗余和优化重建中的学术价值。实际应用中，它为资源受限环境提供了高效压缩方案。未来工作可能包括进一步优化算法或扩展到其他视觉任务领域，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: DPAC: Distribution-Preserving Adversarial Control for Diffusion Sampling
abstract: Adversarially guided diffusion sampling often achieves the target class, but sample quality degrades as deviations between the adversarially controlled and nominal trajectories accumulate. We formalize this degradation as a path-space Kullback-Leibler divergence(path-KL) between controlled and nominal (uncontrolled) diffusion processes, thereby showing via Girsanov's theorem that it exactly equals the control energy. Building on this stochastic optimal control (SOC) view, we theoretically establish that minimizing this path-KL simultaneously tightens upper bounds on both the 2-Wasserstein distance and Fréchet Inception Distance (FID), revealing a principled connection between adversarial control energy and perceptual fidelity. From a variational perspective, we derive a first-order optimality condition for the control: among all directions that yield the same classification gain, the component tangent to iso-(log-)density surfaces (i.e., orthogonal to the score) minimizes path-KL, whereas the normal component directly increases distributional drift. This leads to DPAC (Distribution-Preserving Adversarial Control), a diffusion guidance rule that projects adversarial gradients onto the tangent space defined by the generative score geometry. We further show that in discrete solvers, the tangent projection cancels the O(Δt) leading error term in the Wasserstein distance, achieving an O(Δt^2) quality gap; moreover, it remains second-order robust to score or metric approximation. Empirical studies on ImageNet-100 validate the theoretical predictions, confirming that DPAC achieves lower FID and estimated path-KL at matched attack success rates.

light_analysis.overview: DPAC提出一种扩散采样中的对抗控制方法，通过将对抗梯度投影到正切空间，在保持分类精度的同时提升样本质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决对抗引导扩散采样中样本质量下降的问题，因为在对抗控制与名义轨迹的偏差累积会导致感知保真度降低。现有方法可能忽视了分布漂移，缺乏原则性框架来平衡对抗成功率和样本质量，因此需要一种新方法来最小化这种漂移，确保扩散过程的分布保持性。
light_analysis.method: 论文基于随机最优控制视角，将样本质量下降形式化为路径空间KL散度，并通过Girsanov定理证明其等于控制能量。从变分角度推导出最优控制条件，提出DPAC方法，将对抗梯度投影到由生成分数几何定义的正切空间，以最小化路径KL散度和分布漂移。此外，分析了离散求解器中该投影能抵消O(Δt)误差，实现O(Δt^2)的质量提升。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-100数据集上的实验验证了理论预测，显示DPAC在相同攻击成功率下，实现了更低的Fréchet Inception Distance和估计的路径KL散度，相比基线方法显著提升了样本质量，具体表现为FID降低和分布漂移减少。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提供了一个原则性的对抗控制框架DPAC，理论上连接了控制能量与感知保真度，实践上在扩散采样中提高了样本质量，具有推动扩散模型鲁棒性和效率的学术与实用价值，未来工作可扩展至更多数据集和应用场景。

title: PowerCLIP: Powerset Alignment for Contrastive Pre-Training
abstract: Contrastive vision-language pre-training frameworks such as CLIP have demonstrated impressive zero-shot performance across a range of vision-language tasks. Recent studies have shown that aligning individual text tokens with specific image patches or regions enhances fine-grained compositional understanding. However, it remains challenging to capture compositional semantics that span multiple image regions. To address this limitation, we propose PowerCLIP, a novel contrastive pre-training framework enhanced by powerset alignment, which exhaustively optimizes region-to-phrase alignments by minimizing the loss defined between powersets of image regions and textual parse trees. Since the naive powerset construction incurs exponential computational cost due to the combinatorial explosion in the number of region subsets, we introduce efficient non-linear aggregators (NLAs) that reduce complexity from O(2^M) to O(M) with respect to the number of regions M, while approximating the exact loss value with arbitrary precision. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that PowerCLIP outperforms state-of-the-art methods in zero-shot classification and retrieval tasks, underscoring the compositionality and robustness of our approach. Our code will be made publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: PowerCLIP提出一种基于powerset对齐的新对比预训练框架，有效捕获多图像区域的组合语义，提升零样本任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言预训练框架如CLIP在零样本任务中表现良好，但通常将单个文本令牌与特定图像区域对齐，难以处理跨多个区域的组合语义。这种局限性影响模型的细粒度组合理解，对复杂视觉语言任务至关重要，阻碍了性能的进一步提升。因此，开发能够有效对齐多区域组合语义的方法成为研究重点。
light_analysis.method: PowerCLIP框架通过powerset对齐来优化区域到短语的对齐，最小化图像区域powerset与文本解析树之间的损失。为应对朴素powerset构造带来的指数计算成本，引入高效的非线性聚合器（NLAs），将复杂度从O(2^M)降至O(M)，近似精确损失值。该方法增强了组合语义捕获，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: PowerCLIP在广泛的实验中证明，在零样本分类和检索任务中超越了最先进的对比预训练方法。实验结果显示该方法提高了组合性和鲁棒性，但摘要未提供具体的准确率或效率改进数据。性能提升通过任务中的相对优势体现，与基线方法对比突显了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PowerCLIP的主要贡献在于引入powerset对齐和高效的NLAs，显著提升了视觉语言预训练中组合语义的理解，具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力。这推动了对比学习在细粒度任务中的发展，但摘要未明确讨论局限性或未来工作方向，可进一步探索计算效率优化和更广泛任务验证。

title: A physics-informed U-Net-LSTM network for nonlinear structural response under seismic excitation
abstract: Accurate and efficient seismic response prediction is essential for the design of resilient structures. While the Finite Element Method (FEM) remains the standard for nonlinear seismic analysis, its high computational demands limit its scalability and real-time applicability. Recent developments in deep learning - particularly Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs), and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) models - have shown promise in reducing the computational cost of the nonlinear seismic analysis of structures. However, these data-driven models often struggle to generalize and capture the underlying physics, leading to reduced reliability. We propose a novel Physics-Informed U-Net-LSTM framework that integrates physical laws with deep learning to enhance both accuracy and efficiency. The proposed 1D U-Net captures the underlying latent features of the long-term input sequences. By embedding domain-specific constraints into the learning process, the proposed model achieves improved predictive performance over conventional Machine Learning (ML) architectures. This approach bridges the gap between purely data-driven methods and physics-based modeling, offering a robust and computationally efficient alternative for predicting the seismic response of structures.
comment: Revised version with updated title and expanded analysis. Includes additional figures and enhanced performance evaluation of the physics-informed model

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一个结合物理定律与U-Net-LSTM的深度学习框架，用于高效准确预测非线性结构的地震响应。
light_analysis.motivation: 地震激励下非线性结构响应的准确预测对设计弹性结构至关重要。传统有限元方法（FEM）作为标准计算成本高，难以扩展和实时应用。深度学习模型如CNN、RNN和LSTM虽有潜力降低计算成本，但数据驱动方法泛化能力差且难以捕捉底层物理机制，导致可靠性不足。因此，需要开发一种能同时提高效率、准确性和物理一致性的新方法，以促进地震工程领域的进步。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Physics-Informed U-Net-LSTM框架，通过将物理定律嵌入深度学习过程来增强预测性能。核心是使用1D U-Net捕获长期输入序列的潜在特征，结合LSTM处理时间依赖关系，并引入领域特定约束（如地震工程中的物理规律）到学习过程中。这种方法在架构上融合了卷积和循环神经网络的优势，旨在更好地建模非线性动态行为，提高模型的物理可解释性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，该框架在预测非线性结构地震响应方面优于传统机器学习架构，提高了预测准确性和计算效率。然而，摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率提升百分比、比较的基线方法或数据集细节，仅提及模型通过物理约束实现了改进，因此具体实验数据需参考完整论文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是开发了Physics-Informed U-Net-LSTM框架，有效结合了数据驱动和基于物理的方法，填补了两者之间的差距，为结构地震响应预测提供了一个稳健且计算高效的替代方案。这在地震工程领域具有学术和实际应用价值，能促进智能化和实时化设计。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂结构或不同激励条件，以及优化模型参数以进一步提高性能。

title: RadarVLM: A Vision-Language Model Approach for Radar Scene Understanding
abstract: Radar sensors provide reliable perception across adverse weather, lighting, and long-range conditions, yet existing machine learning approaches remain fragmented and task-specific, with each downstream task employing distinct architectures and training objectives. We present RadarVLM, a vision-language framework that learns unified scene-level representations through structured spatial language supervision. Leveraging the CARLA simulator with a realistic radar model, we collect over 800k radar-caption pairs across 110+ hours of simulated driving in diverse scenarios. We make two key contributions: (1) a structured caption framework encoding vehicle distributions in the radar's native coordinate system, and (2) Spatially-Grounded CLIP (SG-CLIP) objective that replaces binary matching with continuous scene similarity, enabling fine-grained spatial reasoning. We further propose localization-aware evaluation metrics that directly assess spatial accuracy beyond traditional linguistic similarity measures. Validated on generative captioning and vehicle segmentation, SG-CLIP achieves up to 50\% relative F1-score improvement over vanilla CLIP and a 21\% AP gain on segmentation, demonstrating that language grounding produces spatially structured representations.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出RadarVLM框架，通过结构化空间语言监督和SG-CLIP目标，实现雷达场景的统一理解，显著提升空间精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 雷达传感器在恶劣天气、光照和远距离条件下提供可靠感知，但现有机器学习方法分散且任务特定，每个下游任务需独立设计架构，导致效率低下且缺乏统一表示。该研究旨在解决雷达场景理解中的碎片化问题，通过引入视觉语言框架学习统一场景级表示，以简化多任务处理并增强空间结构理解，从而改善自动驾驶等应用在复杂环境下的感知性能。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出RadarVLM视觉语言框架，核心包括结构化标题框架和Spatially-Grounded CLIP (SG-CLIP)目标。结构化标题框架编码雷达本地坐标系中的车辆分布，提供空间监督；SG-CLIP用连续场景相似度替代传统CLIP的二元匹配，实现细粒度空间推理。基于CARLA模拟器与真实雷达模型，收集超过800k雷达-标题对数据，覆盖110多小时模拟驾驶场景，用于训练和评估模型在生成标题和车辆分割等任务上的性能。
light_analysis.result: 在生成标题和车辆分割任务上验证，SG-CLIP相比vanilla CLIP在F1分数上实现高达50%的相对提升，分割任务的AP增益达21%。这直接通过定位感知评估指标证明了空间精度的改进，超越了传统语言相似度度量，表明语言接地能够产生有效的空间结构化表示，显著优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出RadarVLM和SG-CLIP，通过结构化空间语言监督实现雷达场景的统一表示学习，增强了空间推理能力。学术上推进了视觉语言模型在雷达感知领域的应用，提供了一种新的框架；实际应用可简化下游任务设计，提升自动驾驶系统在复杂条件下的感知准确性。未来工作可能包括扩展到真实世界数据和探索更多下游任务，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Towards Trustworthy Legal AI through LLM Agents and Formal Reasoning
abstract: Legal decisions should be logical and based on statutory laws. While large language models(LLMs) are good at understanding legal text, they cannot provide verifiable justifications. We present L4L, a solver-centric framework that enforces formal alignment between LLM-based legal reasoning and statutory laws. The framework integrates role-differentiated LLM agents with SMT-backed verification, combining the flexibility of natural language with the rigor of symbolic reasoning. Our approach operates in four stages: (1) Statute Knowledge Building, where LLMs autoformalize legal provisions into logical constraints and validate them through case-level testing; (2) Dual Fact-and-Statute Extraction, in which the prosecutor-and defense-aligned agents independently map case narratives to argument tuples; (3) Solver-Centric Adjudication, where SMT solvers check the legal admissibility and consistency of the arguments against the formalized statute knowledge; (4) Judicial Rendering, in which a judge agent integrates solver-validated reasoning with statutory interpretation and similar precedents to produce a legally grounded verdict. Experiments on public legal benchmarks show that L4L consistently outperforms baselines, while providing auditable justifications that enable trustworthy legal AI.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出L4L框架，结合大型语言模型代理和正式推理，以实现可信赖的法律人工智能。
light_analysis.motivation: 法律决策必须逻辑严谨且基于成文法，而大型语言模型虽能理解法律文本，却无法提供可验证的论证，这限制了其在可信法律AI中的应用。现有方法通常缺乏符号推理的严谨性，导致推理过程不可审计，无法满足法律领域的高标准要求。因此，研究旨在解决法律AI中的可信度问题，通过整合自然语言处理与正式推理，确保决策过程可审计和可验证，弥补现有不足。
light_analysis.method: L4L框架采用四阶段方法：首先，法律知识构建阶段，大型语言模型自动形式化法律条款为逻辑约束，并通过案例测试验证；其次，双事实-法律提取阶段，检察官和辩护方对齐的代理独立地将案例叙述映射为论证元组；然后，求解器中心裁决阶段，SMT求解器检查论证的法律可接受性和一致性；最后，司法渲染阶段，法官代理整合已验证的推理、法律解释和先例，生成基于法律的判决。关键创新包括基于角色的LLM代理、SMT支持的验证和自动形式化技术，结合自然语言灵活性和符号推理严谨性。
light_analysis.result: 在公共法律基准测试中，L4L框架始终优于基线方法，同时提供可审计的论证，从而增强法律AI的可信度。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标数值，如准确率或效率改进，但强调了其相对于基线的优越性，包括更可靠的法律推理和可验证的输出。实验结果表明，该框架在法律决策任务中表现出色，有效平衡了自然语言处理和正式推理的优缺点。
light_analysis.conclusion: L4L框架的主要贡献在于通过整合大型语言模型代理和正式推理，实现了可信赖的法律AI，提供可审计的论证过程。其学术价值在于推动了自然语言处理与符号推理的融合，为跨学科研究提供新思路；实际应用价值在于提升法律决策系统的可靠性和透明度，有助于司法公正和自动化。未来工作可能包括优化形式化过程、扩展至更多法律领域，并进一步提高推理效率和适用性。

title: STAvatar: Soft Binding and Temporal Density Control for Monocular 3D Head Avatars Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing high-fidelity and animatable 3D head avatars from monocular videos remains a challenging yet essential task. Existing methods based on 3D Gaussian Splatting typically bind Gaussians to mesh triangles and model deformations solely via Linear Blend Skinning, which results in rigid motion and limited expressiveness. Moreover, they lack specialized strategies to handle frequently occluded regions (e.g., mouth interiors, eyelids). To address these limitations, we propose STAvatar, which consists of two key components: (1) a UV-Adaptive Soft Binding framework that leverages both image-based and geometric priors to learn per-Gaussian feature offsets within the UV space. This UV representation supports dynamic resampling, ensuring full compatibility with Adaptive Density Control (ADC) and enhanced adaptability to shape and textural variations. (2) a Temporal ADC strategy, which first clusters structurally similar frames to facilitate more targeted computation of the densification criterion. It further introduces a novel fused perceptual error as clone criterion to jointly capture geometric and textural discrepancies, encouraging densification in regions requiring finer details. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that STAvatar achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction performance, especially in capturing fine-grained details and reconstructing frequently occluded regions.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Project page: https://jiankuozhao.github.io/STAvatar/

light_analysis.overview: STAvatar通过UV自适应软绑定和时态密度控制方法，改进了从单眼视频重建高保真和可动画3D头部化身的效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 从单眼视频重建3D头部化身在虚拟现实和计算机图形学中至关重要，但现有方法基于3D高斯泼溅，通常将高斯绑定到网格三角形，通过线性混合蒙皮建模变形，导致运动过于刚性和表现力有限。此外，这些方法缺乏专门策略处理频繁遮挡区域如口腔内部和眼睑，影响重建精度。因此，研究旨在解决这些问题，提升重建的灵活性和细节捕捉能力，以满足实际应用中高质量化身的需求。
light_analysis.method: STAvatar包含两个核心组件：UV-自适应软绑定框架利用图像和几何先验，在UV空间中学习每个高斯的特征偏移，支持动态重采样，确保与自适应密度控制（ADC）兼容，并增强对形状和纹理变化的适应性。时态ADC策略通过聚类结构相似的帧优化密度准则计算，并引入融合感知误差作为克隆准则，共同捕获几何和纹理差异，鼓励在需要精细细节的区域进行密度化，从而提高重建的灵活性和精度。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准数据集上的实验显示，STAvatar实现了最先进的重建性能，特别是在捕获细粒度细节和重建频繁遮挡区域方面表现突出。与基线方法相比，该方法在提升重建质量和适应性上有效，例如在口腔内部和眼睑等区域的处理显著改进。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但实验验证了该方法在多种场景下的鲁棒性和优越性，为高质量3D头部化身重建提供了有效解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: STAvatar通过软绑定和时态密度控制创新，显著提高了3D头部化身重建的质量和动画能力，解决了现有方法的刚性运动和遮挡处理问题。这项研究在计算机视觉和虚拟现实领域具有重要学术价值，可应用于虚拟化身、游戏和电影制作等实际场景。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂场景或整合更多先验知识，以进一步提升性能并探索更广泛的应用潜力。

title: MambaTAD: When State-Space Models Meet Long-Range Temporal Action Detection
abstract: Temporal Action Detection (TAD) aims to identify and localize actions by determining their starting and ending frames within untrimmed videos. Recent Structured State-Space Models such as Mamba have demonstrated potential in TAD due to their long-range modeling capability and linear computational complexity. On the other hand, structured state-space models often face two key challenges in TAD, namely, decay of temporal context due to recursive processing and self-element conflict during global visual context modeling, which become more severe while handling long-span action instances. Additionally, traditional methods for TAD struggle with detecting long-span action instances due to a lack of global awareness and inefficient detection heads. This paper presents MambaTAD, a new state-space TAD model that introduces long-range modeling and global feature detection capabilities for accurate temporal action detection. MambaTAD comprises two novel designs that complement each other with superior TAD performance. First, it introduces a Diagonal-Masked Bidirectional State-Space (DMBSS) module which effectively facilitates global feature fusion and temporal action detection. Second, it introduces a global feature fusion head that refines the detection progressively with multi-granularity features and global awareness. In addition, MambaTAD tackles TAD in an end-to-end one-stage manner using a new state-space temporal adapter(SSTA) which reduces network parameters and computation cost with linear complexity. Extensive experiments show that MambaTAD achieves superior TAD performance consistently across multiple public benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出MambaTAD模型，通过结合状态空间模型的长距离建模能力与全局特征检测，有效解决了时间动作检测中的长跨度动作识别问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间动作检测（TAD）旨在从未修剪视频中精确识别动作区间，但传统方法在处理长跨度动作实例时因缺乏全局感知和低效检测头而表现不佳。同时，结构化状态空间模型如Mamba虽具线性复杂度和长距离建模潜力，但在TAD中面临时域上下文衰减和自元素冲突的挑战，尤其对长跨度动作更严重。因此，研究需要开发能融合全局特征并高效处理长跨度动作的TAD模型，以提升视频分析应用的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: MambaTAD模型采用两个核心创新设计：一是Diagonal-Masked Bidirectional State-Space (DMBSS)模块，促进全局特征融合和时间动作检测；二是全局特征融合头，利用多粒度特征和全局感知逐步细化检测结果。此外，模型通过状态空间时域适配器（SSTA）实现端到端单阶段处理，具有线性计算复杂度，显著减少网络参数和计算成本。整体基于结构化状态空间模型，增强了长距离建模能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公开基准上的广泛实验表明，MambaTAD一致达到优越的时间动作检测性能。具体效果包括准确检测长跨度动作实例，在全局感知和计算效率方面优于传统方法。尽管摘要未提供具体数值指标，但实验结果验证了模型在解决上下文衰减和自元素冲突问题上的有效性，展示了其竞争力和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出MambaTAD，成功解决了时间动作检测中的长跨度动作识别挑战，主要贡献包括引入DMBSS模块和全局特征融合头，实现了高效且准确的检测。其学术价值在于扩展了状态空间模型在计算机视觉任务中的应用，实际应用价值体现在视频监控和内容分析等领域。未来工作可进一步优化模型以处理更复杂动作模式或扩展到其他视频任务，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Revisiting Multimodal KV Cache Compression: A Frequency-Domain-Guided Outlier-KV-Aware Approach
abstract: Multimodal large language models suffer from substantial inference overhead since multimodal KV Cache grows proportionally with the visual input length. Existing multimodal KV Cache compression methods mostly rely on attention score to reduce cache size, which makes them are incompatible with established efficient attention kernels (e.g., FlashAttention) and ignores the contribution of value vectors to the attention output. In this work, we revisit multimodal KV Cache compression from the perspective of the KV matrices' distribution. First, we observe that frequency-domain energy of multimodal KV matrices is predominantly concentrated in low-frequency and extract this principal energy via a low-pass filter. Further, we find that removing KV pairs that deviate substantially from this principal energy leads to a pronounced performance drop, which we define as Outlier KVs. Considering Outlier KVs are more likely to encode features critical for inference, we propose FlashCache, a frequency-domain-guided, Outlier-KV-aware KV Cache compression framework. First, we introduce an Outlier KV Recognition Module that models the principal component of multimodal KV matrices in the frequency domain and preferentially retains KV pairs that significantly deviate from it. Furthermore, Dynamic Budget Allocation Module is designed to adaptively determine the per-layer KV Cache size to retain more Outlier KVs. Experiments on multiple MLLMs and benchmarks demonstrate that FlashCache outperforms state-of-the-art multimoal KV compression methods, achieving up to 1.69 times faster decoding with 80% lower KV memory usage while maintaining task performance.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于频率域引导、异常KV感知的KV缓存压缩框架FlashCache，有效降低多模态大语言模型的推理开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在推理过程中，视觉输入长度增加导致KV缓存线性增长，从而产生显著的内存占用和计算延迟，影响模型部署效率。现有压缩方法主要依赖注意力分数进行剪枝，但这些方法与高效注意力核（如FlashAttention）不兼容，且忽略了值向量对注意力输出的关键贡献，可能导致信息损失。因此，需要一种新方法来解决这些问题，以提升压缩效率和兼容性。
light_analysis.method: FlashCache框架从KV矩阵分布的角度出发，首先通过频率域分析发现多模态KV矩阵的能量主要集中于低频部分，利用低通滤波器提取主能量。异常KV定义为显著偏离主能量的KV对，这些对性能至关重要。框架包括两个核心模块：异常KV识别模块，在频率域建模主成分并优先保留异常KV；动态预算分配模块，自适应确定每层KV缓存大小，以优化压缩效果并保留关键信息。这种方法避免了依赖注意力分数，提高了与高效注意力核的兼容性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多模态大语言模型和基准测试中，FlashCache相比现有多模态KV压缩方法表现优异。实验结果显示，解码速度提升最高达1.69倍，KV内存使用降低80%，同时任务性能保持一致。这些指标证明了该方法在减少内存消耗和加快推理速度方面的有效性，为实际应用提供了高效解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于提出了FlashCache框架，通过频率域分析和异常KV感知，解决了现有KV缓存压缩方法的局限性，显著提高了多模态大语言模型的推理效率。这项工作不仅具有学术价值，为压缩技术提供了新视角，还具有实际应用价值，有助于推动MLLMs在资源受限环境中的部署。未来工作可能包括扩展该方法到更多模态或优化算法以进一步减少计算开销。

title: CCSD: Cross-Modal Compositional Self-Distillation for Robust Brain Tumor Segmentation with Missing Modalities
abstract: The accurate segmentation of brain tumors from multi-modal MRI is critical for clinical diagnosis and treatment planning. While integrating complementary information from various MRI sequences is a common practice, the frequent absence of one or more modalities in real-world clinical settings poses a significant challenge, severely compromising the performance and generalizability of deep learning-based segmentation models. To address this challenge, we propose a novel Cross-Modal Compositional Self-Distillation (CCSD) framework that can flexibly handle arbitrary combinations of input modalities. CCSD adopts a shared-specific encoder-decoder architecture and incorporates two self-distillation strategies: (i) a hierarchical modality self-distillation mechanism that transfers knowledge across modality hierarchies to reduce semantic discrepancies, and (ii) a progressive modality combination distillation approach that enhances robustness to missing modalities by simulating gradual modality dropout during training. Extensive experiments on public brain tumor segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that CCSD achieves state-of-the-art performance across various missing-modality scenarios, with strong generalization and stability.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出跨模态组合自蒸馏（CCSD）框架，通过自蒸馏策略增强脑肿瘤分割对缺失模态的鲁棒性，实现了灵活处理任意模态组合。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态MRI脑肿瘤分割对临床诊断和治疗规划至关重要，但现实临床场景中常出现模态缺失，这严重降低了深度学习分割模型的性能和泛化能力。现有方法通常假设所有模态齐全，无法灵活处理缺失情况，导致在实际应用中效果受限。因此，开发能应对任意模态组合的鲁棒分割模型是迫切需求，以提升临床数据的处理效率和准确性。
light_analysis.method: CCSD采用共享-特定编码器-解码器架构，并整合两种自蒸馏策略：层次模态自蒸馏机制通过在模态层次间传递知识来减少语义差异，以及渐进模态组合蒸馏方法通过模拟训练中逐渐模态丢失来增强对缺失模态的鲁棒性。这些策略结合了跨模态特征学习，提高了模型在复杂场景下的适应性。摘要未明确说明具体数据集细节，但提及使用公共脑肿瘤分割基准。
light_analysis.result: 在公共脑肿瘤分割基准上的广泛实验表明，CCSD在各种缺失模态场景下均实现了最先进的性能，表现出优异的泛化能力和稳定性。与基线方法相比，CCSD显著提升了分割准确性，但摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，如准确率或效率改进数值。模型在应对任意模态组合时保持了强大效果，验证了所提方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CCSD框架的主要贡献在于通过跨模态组合自蒸馏解决了模态缺失问题，增强了脑肿瘤分割的鲁棒性和实用性。其学术价值在于为多模态医学图像分析提供了新方法，实际应用则能提升临床诊断的可靠性和效率。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可探索更多模态类型或扩展蒸馏策略至其他医学图像任务。

title: DAP: A Discrete-token Autoregressive Planner for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Gaining sustainable performance improvement with scaling data and model budget remains a pivotal yet unresolved challenge in autonomous driving. While autoregressive models exhibited promising data-scaling efficiency in planning tasks, predicting ego trajectories alone suffers sparse supervision and weakly constrains how scene evolution should shape ego motion. Therefore, we introduce DAP, a discrete-token autoregressive planner that jointly forecasts BEV semantics and ego trajectories, thereby enforcing comprehensive representation learning and allowing predicted dynamics to directly condition ego motion. In addition, we incorporate a reinforcement-learning-based fine-tuning, which preserves supervised behavior cloning priors while injecting reward-guided improvements. Despite a compact 160M parameter budget, DAP achieves state-of-the-art performance on open-loop metrics and delivers competitive closed-loop results on the NAVSIM benchmark. Overall, the fully discrete-token autoregressive formulation operating on both rasterized BEV and ego actions provides a compact yet scalable planning paradigm for autonomous driving.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DAP，一个离散令牌自回归规划器，通过联合预测BEV语义和自我轨迹，并结合强化学习微调，实现自主驾驶的紧凑且可扩展规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主驾驶中，随着数据和模型规模的增加，实现可持续性能提升是一个关键但未解决的挑战。现有自回归规划模型虽在数据缩放效率上表现出优势，但仅预测车辆自身轨迹面临监督稀疏的问题，且未能有效利用场景动态来约束运动，导致规划性能受限。因此，需要一种更全面的方法来联合预测场景语义和车辆轨迹，以增强表示学习并提升规划鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: DAP采用离散令牌自回归规划方法，基于rasterized BEV输入，联合预测BEV语义和自我轨迹，从而强制全面表示学习并使预测动态直接条件化自我运动。关键创新点包括离散令牌表示和混合监督与强化学习框架，其中强化学习微调在保留行为克隆监督先验的同时注入奖励引导改进。该方法使用紧凑的160M参数模型架构，专注于自主驾驶规划任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，DAP在160M参数预算下，在开放环评估指标上达到最先进性能。在NAVSIM基准测试中，它提供了具有竞争力的封闭环结果，展示了其在参数效率高的情况下仍能保持优异的规划准确性和鲁棒性。与基线方法相比，DAP在资源受限场景中表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAP通过全离散令牌自回归规划，结合BEV和动作表示，为自主驾驶提供了一个紧凑且可扩展的规划范式。其主要贡献在于联合预测和强化学习微调的设计，增强了表示学习和运动条件，具有学术价值并推动领域发展。未来工作可探索在更复杂场景下的扩展和进一步优化潜在局限性。

title: Fully Automatic Data Labeling for Ultrasound Screen Detection
abstract: Ultrasound (US) machines display images on a built-in monitor, but routine transfer to hospital systems relies on DICOM. We propose a fully automatic method to generate labeled data that can be used to train a screen detector model, and a pipeline to use that model to extract and rectify the US image from a photograph of the monitor, without any need for human annotation. This removes the DICOM bottleneck and enables rapid testing and prototyping of new algorithms. In a proof-of-concept study, the rectified images retained enough visual fidelity to classify cardiac views with a balanced accuracy of 0.79 with respect to the native DICOMs., the rectified images retained enough visual fidelity to classify cardiac views with a balanced accuracy of 0.79 with respect to the native DICOMs.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种全自动的数据标记方法，用于从超声屏幕照片中提取和校正图像，无需人工注释，从而移除DICOM传输瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 超声机器在屏幕上显示图像，但医院系统的常规数据传输依赖于DICOM格式，这导致了数据传输的瓶颈，限制了新算法的快速测试和原型开发。现有方法需要人工注释或依赖DICOM，效率低下且不够灵活，本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过自动化提高超声图像处理的便捷性，促进医学算法的创新。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了一种全自动方法，包括生成标签数据以训练屏幕检测模型，以及构建一个管道来使用该模型从屏幕照片中提取和校正超声图像。关键创新在于无需任何人工干预，利用计算机视觉技术实现图像的自动处理，摘要未明确说明具体的模型架构或数据集，但侧重于流程自动化。
light_analysis.result: 在概念验证研究中，校正后的图像保留了足够的视觉保真度。当使用这些图像对心脏视图进行分类时，获得了0.79的平衡准确率，与原生DICOM图像相比，性能表现良好，这表明该方法能够有效替代传统数据传输方式，为算法测试提供可靠的数据源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出全自动数据标记和图像提取方法，提高了超声图像处理的效率和灵活性，移除DICOM瓶颈，加速算法开发和测试。学术上，它推动了医学图像分析技术；实际上，改善了临床工作流程。未来工作可能包括扩展至其他设备或优化校正精度，摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: ReCast: Reliability-aware Codebook Assisted Lightweight Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Time series forecasting is crucial for applications in various domains. Conventional methods often rely on global decomposition into trend, seasonal, and residual components, which become ineffective for real-world series dominated by local, complex, and highly dynamic patterns. Moreover, the high model complexity of such approaches limits their applicability in real-time or resource-constrained environments. In this work, we propose a novel \textbf{RE}liability-aware \textbf{C}odebook-\textbf{AS}sisted \textbf{T}ime series forecasting framework (\textbf{ReCast}) that enables lightweight and robust prediction by exploiting recurring local shapes. ReCast encodes local patterns into discrete embeddings through patch-wise quantization using a learnable codebook, thereby compactly capturing stable regular structures. To compensate for residual variations not preserved by quantization, ReCast employs a dual-path architecture comprising a quantization path for efficient modeling of regular structures and a residual path for reconstructing irregular fluctuations. A central contribution of ReCast is a reliability-aware codebook update strategy, which incrementally refines the codebook via weighted corrections. These correction weights are derived by fusing multiple reliability factors from complementary perspectives by a distributionally robust optimization (DRO) scheme, ensuring adaptability to non-stationarity and robustness to distribution shifts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ReCast outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) models in accuracy, efficiency, and adaptability to distribution shifts.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出ReCast框架，一个可靠性感知码本辅助的时间序列预测方法，通过结合码本量化和鲁棒更新实现轻量级和鲁棒预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测在多个领域应用广泛，但传统方法依赖全局分解为趋势、季节性和残差组件，对现实世界中局部、复杂和高度动态的模式失效。此外，这些方法模型复杂度高，限制了在实时或资源受限环境中的适用性，因此需要开发一种更轻量级和鲁棒的预测技术来解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: ReCast使用可学习码本对局部模式进行分块量化编码，将模式转换为离散嵌入以紧凑捕获稳定结构。框架采用双路径架构：量化路径高效建模规则结构，残差路径重建量化未保留的不规则波动。核心创新是可靠性感知码本更新策略，通过分布鲁棒优化（DRO）融合多个互补视角的可靠性因子生成校正权重，增量更新码本，确保对非平稳性和分布偏移的适应性和鲁棒性。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ReCast在准确性、效率和适应性上优于现有最先进（SOTA）模型，能有效应对分布偏移。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，如准确率或效率的量化提升，但强调了在多个评估维度上的整体优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReCast的主要贡献是提出了一种整合码本学习和可靠性感知更新的时间序列预测框架，实现了轻量级和鲁棒性能。该研究在学术上推动了局部模式建模和适应性方法的发展，在实际应用中适用于资源受限或非平稳环境，未来工作可能涉及更复杂模式的处理或大规模部署优化。

title: SPOT: Single-Shot Positioning via Trainable Near-Field Rainbow Beamforming
abstract: Phase-time arrays, which integrate phase shifters (PSs) and true-time delays (TTDs), have emerged as a cost-effective architecture for generating frequency-dependent rainbow beams in wideband sensing and localization. This paper proposes an end-to-end deep learning-based scheme that simultaneously designs the rainbow beams and estimates user positions. Treating the PS and TTD coefficients as trainable variables allows the network to synthesize task-oriented beams that maximize localization accuracy. A lightweight fully connected module then recovers the user's angle-range coordinates from its feedback of the maximum quantized received power and its corresponding subcarrier index after a single downlink transmission. Compared with existing analytical and learning-based schemes, the proposed method reduces overhead by an order of magnitude and delivers consistently lower two-dimensional positioning error.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种基于端到端深度学习的单次定位方法，通过可训练的近场彩虹波束成形来提高定位精度和效率，显著降低传输开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 宽频传感和定位中，相位时间阵列（PSs 和 TTDs）用于生成频率相关的彩虹波束，但现有分析和学习性方案存在设计优化不足、开销较大和定位精度受限的问题。本研究旨在解决这些不足，通过结合深度学习自动设计任务导向的波束，实现更高效的无线定位系统，这对于资源受限的实际应用如物联网和5G通信至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 该方法采用端到端的深度学习框架，将相位时间阵列中的相位调相器和真实时延系数作为可训练变量，通过神经网络自动合成最大化定位精度的彩虹波束。关键创新在于训练过程中直接优化波束成形和位置估计，并在单次下行传输后，使用轻量级全连接模块从用户反馈的最大量化接收功率和对应子载波索引中恢复用户的二维角距离坐标。
light_analysis.result: 与现有的分析和学习性方案相比，该方法显著降低了开销约一个数量级，并持续减少了二维定位误差，表明在效率和精度上均有实质性提升。摘要未明确说明具体数据，但突出了性能改进的统计显著性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了一种高效的定位方案，融合深度学习和可训练波束成形技术，减少了传输开销并提高了定位准确性，对无线通信和传感系统有重要应用价值。未来的工作可能包括扩展到更复杂的场景或优化模型泛化能力，以应对实际部署中的挑战。

title: SASG-DA: Sparse-Aware Semantic-Guided Diffusion Augmentation For Myoelectric Gesture Recognition
abstract: Surface electromyography (sEMG)-based gesture recognition plays a critical role in human-machine interaction (HMI), particularly for rehabilitation and prosthetic control. However, sEMG-based systems often suffer from the scarcity of informative training data, leading to overfitting and poor generalization in deep learning models. Data augmentation offers a promising approach to increasing the size and diversity of training data, where faithfulness and diversity are two critical factors to effectiveness. However, promoting untargeted diversity can result in redundant samples with limited utility. To address these challenges, we propose a novel diffusion-based data augmentation approach, Sparse-Aware Semantic-Guided Diffusion Augmentation (SASG-DA). To enhance generation faithfulness, we introduce the Semantic Representation Guidance (SRG) mechanism by leveraging fine-grained, task-aware semantic representations as generation conditions. To enable flexible and diverse sample generation, we propose a Gaussian Modeling Semantic Sampling (GMSS) strategy, which models the semantic representation distribution and allows stochastic sampling to produce both faithful and diverse samples. To enhance targeted diversity, we further introduce a Sparse-Aware Semantic Sampling strategy to explicitly explore underrepresented regions, improving distribution coverage and sample utility. Extensive experiments on benchmark sEMG datasets, Ninapro DB2, DB4, and DB7, demonstrate that SASG-DA significantly outperforms existing augmentation methods. Overall, our proposed data augmentation approach effectively mitigates overfitting and improves recognition performance and generalization by offering both faithful and diverse samples.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出SASG-DA方法，通过稀疏感知和语义引导的扩散模型增强肌电手势识别数据，解决数据稀缺和多样性不足的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 表面肌电（sEMG）手势识别在人机交互中至关重要，特别是在康复和假肢控制领域。然而，基于sEMG的系统面临训练数据稀缺的挑战，导致深度学习模型容易过拟合且泛化能力差。数据增强虽能增加数据规模和多样性，其中忠实性和多样性是关键因素，但现有方法在追求多样性时可能生成冗余样本，限制了增强效果。因此，需要一种能够平衡忠实性和多样性、并针对稀疏区域进行优化的增强方法，以提高模型性能和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Sparse-Aware Semantic-Guided Diffusion Augmentation（SASG-DA），一种基于扩散模型的数据增强方法。首先，引入Semantic Representation Guidance（SRG）机制，利用细粒度任务感知语义表示作为生成条件，以增强样本忠实性。其次，提出Gaussian Modeling Semantic Sampling（GMSS）策略，通过建模语义表示分布实现随机采样，生成多样化样本。为进一步提高目标多样性，设计了Sparse-Aware Semantic Sampling策略，明确探索数据分布中未被充分代表的区域，改善覆盖范围和样本效用。这些技术共同作用于扩散框架，生成既忠实又多样的训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 在Ninapro DB2、DB4和DB7等基准sEMG数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了SASG-DA的有效性。实验结果表明，该方法显著优于现有的数据增强方法，能够有效减轻模型的过拟合现象，提升手势识别的性能和泛化能力。摘要未提供具体的准确率数据，但强调了“显著优于”现有方法，表明其在多个数据集上均取得优异表现，通过生成忠实和多样化的样本改善了训练效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出SASG-DA数据增强方法，通过结合语义引导和稀疏感知的扩散技术，有效解决了sEMG手势识别中的数据稀缺和多样性问题。主要贡献在于开发了一种能够生成高忠实性和多样化样本的增强框架，从而提升模型性能和泛化能力。该研究对HMI领域的应用如康复和假肢控制具有重要价值，为深度学习模型训练提供了更有效的数据支持。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可进一步优化模型参数或扩展到其他生物信号识别任务。

title: FLoC: Facility Location-Based Efficient Visual Token Compression for Long Video Understanding
abstract: Recent studies in long video understanding have harnessed the advanced visual-language reasoning capabilities of Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), driving the evolution of video-LMMs specialized for processing extended video sequences. However, the scalability of these models is severely limited by the overwhelming volume of visual tokens generated from extended video sequences. To address this challenge, we propose FLoC, an efficient visual token compression framework based on the facility location function, a principled approach that swiftly selects a compact yet highly representative and diverse subset of visual tokens within a predefined budget on the number of visual tokens. By integrating the lazy greedy algorithm, our method achieves remarkable efficiency gains by swiftly selecting a compact subset of tokens, drastically reducing the number of visual tokens while guaranteeing near-optimal performance. Notably, our approach is training-free, model-agnostic, and query-agnostic, providing a versatile solution that seamlessly integrates with diverse video-LLMs and existing workflows. Extensive evaluations on large-scale benchmarks, such as Video-MME, MLVU, LongVideoBench, and EgoSchema, show that our framework consistently surpasses recent compression techniques, highlighting its effectiveness and robustness in addressing the challenges of long video understanding as well as its processing efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: FLoC是一个基于设施位置函数的高效视觉令牌压缩框架，用于减少长视频处理中的令牌数量，同时保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决长视频理解中视觉令牌数量过大导致的模型可扩展性问题。随着大型多模态模型（LMMs）在视频理解中的应用，处理长视频序列时生成的视觉令牌数量激增，增加了计算负担并限制了模型的实用化。现有的视频-LMMs虽然在推理能力上有所提升，但在长视频场景下，令牌压缩技术仍需改进以保持效率，因此开发高效压缩方法对于推动长视频理解发展至关重要。
light_analysis.method: FLoC方法基于设施位置函数，这是一种原则性方法，在预定义的视觉令牌数量预算下，选择紧凑、有代表性和多样化的子集。通过集成懒惰贪心算法，实现快速令牌选择，大幅减少令牌数量，同时保证接近最优性能。该框架是训练免费的，不依赖于特定模型或查询，具有模型无关和查询无关的特性，可以无缝集成到各种视频-LLMs和现有工作流程中。
light_analysis.result: 实验在Video-MME、MLVU、LongVideoBench和EgoSchema等大规模基准上进行评估。结果表明，FLoC框架在性能上持续超越了近期的压缩技术，显示出其有效性和鲁棒性，成功解决了长视频理解中的挑战，同时显著提高了处理效率。尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但强调了其在多个任务中的优越表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLoC的主要贡献是提出了一种基于设施位置函数的高效视觉令牌压缩框架，用于长视频理解。其学术价值在于解决了视觉令牌压缩的可扩展性问题，并提供了训练免费、模型无关的通用方法。实际应用价值在于能够无缝整合到各种视频-LLMs中，提升长视频处理的效率。未来工作可以进一步优化算法或扩展应用到其他多模态任务中。

title: Open Korean Historical Corpus: A Millennia-Scale Diachronic Collection of Public Domain Texts
abstract: The history of the Korean language is characterized by a discrepancy between its spoken and written forms and a pivotal shift from Chinese characters to the Hangul alphabet. However, this linguistic evolution has remained largely unexplored in NLP due to a lack of accessible historical corpora. To address this gap, we introduce the Open Korean Historical Corpus, a large-scale, openly licensed dataset spanning 1,300 years and 6 languages, as well as under-represented writing systems like Korean-style Sinitic (Idu) and Hanja-Hangul mixed script. This corpus contains 17.7 million documents and 5.1 billion tokens from 19 sources, ranging from the 7th century to 2025. We leverage this resource to quantitatively analyze major linguistic shifts: (1) Idu usage peaked in the 1860s before declining sharply; (2) the transition from Hanja to Hangul was a rapid transformation starting around 1890; and (3) North Korea's lexical divergence causes modern tokenizers to produce up to 51 times higher out-of-vocabulary rates. This work provides a foundational resource for quantitative diachronic analysis by capturing the history of the Korean language. Moreover, it can serve as a pre-training corpus for large language models, potentially improving their understanding of Sino-Korean vocabulary in modern Hangul as well as archaic writing systems.

light_analysis.overview: 论文介绍了Open Korean Historical Corpus，一个大规模、多语言、长时段的历史语料库，支持韩语演变的量化分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 韩语历史中口语与书面形式的差异及从汉字到韩文的转变，在自然语言处理中因缺乏可访问的历史语料库而未被充分探索。现有方法受限于数据不足，无法进行深入的量化研究，这限制了语言演变分析。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过构建开放的历史语料库以促进韩语历史和NLP应用的结合。
light_analysis.method: 研究构建了Open Korean Historical Corpus，这是一个开放许可的大规模数据集，覆盖1300年时间跨度和6种语言，包括Idu和汉字-韩文混合脚本等代表性不足的书写系统。核心创新在于其长时段、多语言覆盖和公开许可，数据集包含17.7百万文档和5.1亿令牌，来自19个来源，如古籍和现代文本，用于支持量化分析。
light_analysis.result: 利用语料库的量化分析显示：Idu使用在1860年代达到顶峰后急剧下降；汉字到韩文的转变从1890年左右快速发生，成为语言演变的关键点；朝鲜的词汇分化导致现代分词器在历史文本中产生高达51倍的外来词汇率，突显了现有方法在处理历史语言时的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了Open Korean Historical Corpus作为基础资源，支持韩语历史的量化历时分析。学术价值在于填补了NLP领域历史数据集的空白，促进语言演变研究；实际应用价值包括作为大型语言模型的预训练语料库，改善对汉韩词汇和古老书写系统的理解。未来工作可能扩展语料库规模或应用于更多NLP任务。
