title: Traceable Evidence Enhanced Visual Grounded Reasoning: Evaluation and Methodology
abstract: Models like OpenAI-o3 pioneer visual grounded reasoning by dynamically referencing visual regions, just like human "thinking with images". However, no benchmark exists to evaluate these capabilities holistically. To bridge this gap, we propose TreeBench (Traceable Evidence Evaluation Benchmark), a diagnostic benchmark built on three principles: (1) focused visual perception of subtle targets in complex scenes, (2) traceable evidence via bounding box evaluation, and (3) second-order reasoning to test object interactions and spatial hierarchies beyond simple object localization. Prioritizing images with dense objects, we initially sample 1K high-quality images from SA-1B, and incorporate eight LMM experts to manually annotate questions, candidate options, and answers for each image. After three stages of quality control, TreeBench consists of 405 challenging visual question-answering pairs, even the most advanced models struggle with this benchmark, where none of them reach 60% accuracy, e.g., OpenAI-o3 scores only 54.87. Furthermore, we introduce TreeVGR (Traceable Evidence Enhanced Visual Grounded Reasoning), a training paradigm to supervise localization and reasoning jointly with reinforcement learning, enabling accurate localizations and explainable reasoning pathways. Initialized from Qwen2.5-VL-7B, it improves V* Bench (+16.8), MME-RealWorld (+12.6), and TreeBench (+13.4), proving traceability is key to advancing vision-grounded reasoning. The code is available at https://github.com/Haochen-Wang409/TreeVGR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TreeBench评估基准和TreeVGR训练范式，通过强化学习增强视觉基础推理的可追溯性和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视觉基础推理模型如OpenAI-o3能够动态引用视觉区域，但缺乏全面评估其能力的基准。现有方法往往忽视可追溯证据和二阶推理，导致在复杂场景中难以处理细微目标和对象交互，限制了模型的解释性和实用性。因此，需要一个新的诊断基准来填补空白，以推动更可靠的视觉基础推理模型发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究构建TreeBench基准，基于SA-1B的1K图像，由八名专家手动标注问题、选项和答案，经过三级质量控制形成405个挑战性视觉问答对。基准遵循聚焦感知、可追溯证据（通过边界框评估）和二阶推理原则。同时，提出TreeVGR训练范式，利用强化学习联合监督定位和推理，基于Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型初始化，以实现准确的可追溯性和解释性推理路径。
light_analysis.result: 在TreeBench上，最先进的模型表现不佳，如OpenAI-o3准确率仅54.87%，无模型达到60%准确率。提出的TreeVGR方法显著提升性能，在V* Bench上提高16.8点，MME-RealWorld上提高12.6点，TreeBench上提高13.4点。这些结果表明，可追溯性对视觉基础推理性能有重要影响，强化学习联合监督能有效改进定位和推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出TreeBench基准以全面评估视觉基础推理能力，并通过TreeVGR训练范式强调了可追溯证据的关键作用。它为解释性推理提供了新方法，对学术研究和实际应用如自动化视觉分析具有价值。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及基准扩展或方法优化，以进一步推动领域发展。

title: Eka-Eval: An Evaluation Framework for Low-Resource Multilingual Large Language Models
abstract: The rapid evolution of Large Language Models' has underscored the need for evaluation frameworks that are globally applicable, flexible, and modular, and that support a wide range of tasks, model types, and linguistic settings. We introduce EKA-EVAL, a unified, end- to-end framework that combines a zero-code web interface and an interactive CLI to ensure broad accessibility. It integrates 55+ multilingual benchmarks across nine evaluation categories, supports local and proprietary models, and provides 11 core capabilities through a modular, plug-and-play architecture. Designed for scalable, multilingual evaluation with support for low-resource multilingual languages, EKA-EVAL is, to the best of our knowledge, the first suite to offer comprehensive coverage in a single platform. Comparisons against five existing baselines indicate improvements of at least 2x better on key usability measures, with the highest user satisfaction, faster setup times, and consistent benchmark reproducibility. The framework is open-source and publicly available at https://github.com/lingo-iitgn/eka-eval.

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入 EKA-EVAL，一个端到端的评估框架，首次在单一平台上全面支持低资源多语言大型语言模型的评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型的快速发展凸显了对全球适用、灵活、模块化评估框架的需求，现有工具往往在多语言支持、特别是低资源语言方面存在不足，导致评估过程复杂或不全面。EKA-EVAL 旨在解决这一问题，提供一个综合性平台，支持多种任务、模型类型和语言设置，以满足研究社区对高效、可扩展评估的迫切需求。
light_analysis.method: EKA-EVAL 结合了零代码网页界面和交互式 CLI，确保广泛可访问性。它集成 55 多个多语言基准测试，涵盖九类评估类别，支持本地和专有模型，通过模块化即插即用架构提供 11 个核心能力，如基准管理、模型评估和结果可视化。关键创新点是统一的端到端设计，允许用户灵活配置和扩展评估流程，适应不同研究场景。
light_analysis.result: 与五个现有基线相比，EKA-EVAL 在关键可用性指标上表现出至少两倍的提升，包括最高用户满意度、更快设置时间和一致的基准再现性。这些结果基于摘要中提到的对比实验，表明框架在用户体验和评估效率方面显著优于传统方法，为多语言模型评估提供了更可靠的工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: EKA-EVAL 的主要贡献是提供一个全面覆盖低资源多语言大型语言模型评估的开源框架，具有模块化架构和广泛语言支持。其学术价值在于促进多语言 AI 研究，特别是低资源语言的评估；实际应用价值体现在帮助开发者和研究者轻松评估模型，推动技术普及。未来工作方向可能包括扩展更多语言和基准测试，以增强框架的适用性。

title: MuRating: A High Quality Data Selecting Approach to Multilingual Large Language Model Pretraining
abstract: Data quality is a critical driver of large language model performance, yet existing model-based selection methods focus almost exclusively on English. We introduce MuRating, a scalable framework that transfers high-quality English data-quality signals into a single rater for 17 target languages. MuRating aggregates multiple English "raters" via pairwise comparisons to learn unified document-quality scores,then projects these judgments through translation to train a multilingual evaluator on monolingual, cross-lingual, and parallel text pairs. Applied to web data, MuRating selects balanced subsets of English and multilingual content to pretrain a 1.2 B-parameter LLaMA model. Compared to strong baselines, including QuRater, AskLLM, DCLM and so on, our approach boosts average accuracy on both English benchmarks and multilingual evaluations, with especially large gains on knowledge-intensive tasks. We further analyze translation fidelity, selection biases, and underrepresentation of narrative material, outlining directions for future work.

light_analysis.overview: MuRating是一个可扩展框架，通过聚合英语数据质量信号并投影到多种语言，用于多语言大型语言模型预训练中的高质量数据选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决多语言大型语言模型预训练中的数据质量问题。现有方法如QuRater和AskLLM主要集中于英语，忽略了其他语言的数据质量评估，导致多语言模型性能受限。数据质量是模型性能的关键因素，尤其在知识密集型任务中，高质量的多语言数据能显著提升泛化能力。因此，开发一个跨语言数据选择框架具有重要实践意义。
light_analysis.method: MuRating框架首先通过成对比较多个英语文档评分者，学习统一的文档质量分数。然后，利用翻译技术将这些英语质量判断投影到17种目标语言，训练一个多语言评估器，该评估器能处理单语、跨语言和平行文本对。具体应用中，框架从网络数据中选择平衡的英语和多语言内容子集，用于预训练一个1.2B参数的LLaMA模型。关键创新在于通过翻译投影实现多语言数据质量评估。
light_analysis.result: 与强基线方法如QuRater、AskLLM和DCLM相比，MuRating在英语基准测试和多语言评估中平均准确率均有提升。尤其在知识密集型任务上，提升幅度更为显著，尽管摘要未提供具体数值。该方法有效优化了数据选择过程，增强了模型在多样化语言任务上的性能表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出MuRating框架，为多语言LLM预训练提供高质量数据选择方法。研究扩展了数据选择技术到多语言领域，具有学术价值；实际应用中能优化模型训练。局限性包括翻译保真度、选择偏见和叙述材料代表性不足的分析，为未来工作如改进翻译质量、减少偏见和扩展到更多语言指明了方向。

title: Why Reinforcement Fine-Tuning Enables MLLMs Preserve Prior Knowledge Better: A Data Perspective
abstract: Post-training algorithms such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) are widely used to adapt (multimodal) large language models to downstream tasks. While effective at task adaptation, their impact on retaining prior knowledge remains unclear. In this paper, we introduce jigsaw puzzles as a novel task absent from existing pretraining corpora and systematically study the behavior of SFT and RFT on the open-source Qwen2.5-VL series. Our experiments reveal a sharp trade-off: SFT enables rapid task acquisition but leads to catastrophic forgetting, whereas RFT learns more slowly but better maintains prior knowledge. We study this phenomenon through learning dynamics by examining both the magnitude and direction of how training data influence prior knowledge. Our analysis shows that RFT mainly reinforces correct samples naturally aligned with the base model's probability landscape, leading to weaker interference with prior knowledge. Moreover, training on RFT-simulated rollouts, which exert a smaller magnitude of influence and are better aligned in direction to prior knowledge, allows SFT to preserve prior knowledge better while rapidly learning new tasks. We further validate our framework on Qwen2.5 post-training in math and scientific QA, observing consistent forgetting and learning-dynamics trends. These findings suggest that the distribution of post-training data, rather than algorithmic differences alone, plays a central role in forgetting, and highlight RFT as a promising ingredient for stable continual post-training.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文通过数据视角揭示强化微调在多模态大语言模型中更好地保留先验知识的机制，解决了监督微调导致的灾难性遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于后训练算法如监督微调和强化微调广泛用于适应下游任务，但它们对保留先验知识的影响不明确。现有方法中，监督微调虽能快速学习新任务，但常导致灾难性遗忘，损害模型的泛化能力，这在持续学习和模型稳定性中至关重要。因此，本文旨在系统比较两种方法对先验知识保留的效果，探索其内在机制，以指导更优的后训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括引入jigsaw puzzles作为新任务，该任务未在现有预训练语料库中出现，以系统性比较监督微调和强化微调在开源Qwen2.5-VL系列上的行为。关键创新在于从数据角度分析学习动态，检查训练数据对先验知识影响的大小和方向。具体技术路线涉及使用强化微调模拟的rollouts进行训练，这些rollouts对先验知识的影响较小且方向更对齐，从而揭示强化微调如何通过强化与基础模型概率景观自然对齐的样本，减少对先验知识的干扰。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，监督微调能够快速获取新任务但导致灾难性遗忘，而强化微调学习速度较慢但能更好地保留先验知识。分析表明，强化微调主要强化与基础模型概率景观对齐的正确样本，从而对先验知识的干扰较弱。在Qwen2.5后训练的数学和科学QA任务中，也观察到一致的遗忘和学习动态趋势，进一步验证了强化微调的优势。与基线监督微调相比，强化微调在保持知识稳定性方面表现更佳，突显了其在减少遗忘方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论表明，后训练数据分布而非算法差异在遗忘中扮演关键角色，强化微调成为稳定持续后训练的有前途方法。主要贡献在于从数据视角阐明了强化微调保留先验知识的机制，为后续研究提供了理论基础。学术价值在于加深了对多模态大语言模型后训练中遗忘问题的理解，应用价值则体现在指导实际部署中的微调策略，以减少知识损失。未来工作可进一步探索数据分布优化的方法以实现高效持续学习。

title: Parameter Stress Analysis in Reinforcement Learning: Applying Synaptic Filtering to Policy Networks
abstract: This paper explores reinforcement learning (RL) policy robustness by systematically analyzing network parameters under internal and external stresses. \textcolor{black}{We apply synaptic filtering methods using high-pass, low-pass, and pulse-wave filters from} \citep{pravin2024fragility}, as an internal stress by selectively perturbing parameters, while adversarial attacks apply external stress through modified agent observations. This dual approach enables the classification of parameters as \textit{fragile}, \textit{robust}, or \textit{antifragile}, based on their influence on policy performance in clean and adversarial settings. Parameter scores are defined to quantify these characteristics, and the framework is validated on proximal policy optimization (PPO)-trained agents in Mujoco continuous control environments. The results highlight the presence of antifragile parameters that enhance policy performance under stress, demonstrating the potential of targeted filtering techniques to improve RL policy adaptability. These insights provide a foundation for future advancements in the design of robust and antifragile RL systems.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种基于突触过滤的强化学习策略参数应力分析框架，用于分类和量化参数在内部和外部压力下的稳健性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于探索强化学习（RL）策略在面临压力和攻击时的稳健性问题。在实际应用中，RL 策略的稳健性不足可能导致性能不稳定或失败，现有方法往往缺乏对网络参数级别的系统分析，难以理解参数在压力下的具体行为。因此，本研究旨在通过结合内部和外部应力，深入分析参数特性，为设计更可靠的 RL 系统提供基础，以应对复杂环境中的不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 本论文采用双压力方法分析 RL 策略参数：内部压力通过突触过滤技术（包括高通、低通和脉冲波过滤器）有选择地扰动网络参数，模拟内部变化；外部压力则通过对抗攻击修改代理的观察数据施加。基于参数在干净和对抗环境中对策略性能的影响，将其分类为脆弱、稳健或反脆弱，并定义参数分数来量化这些特征。该方法在 Mujoco 连续控制环境中使用 PPO 训练的代理进行验证，确保了框架的实用性和可操作性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在压力条件下，存在反脆弱参数能够增强策略性能，证明了参数分类框架的有效性。通过应用有针对性的过滤技术，RL 策略的适应性和稳健性得到提升，展示了该方法的潜力。摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据，但与基线方法的对比方面，摘要未明确说明。结果突出了反脆弱参数在改善策略性能中的关键作用，为进一步优化提供了方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献在于提出了一个综合分析 RL 策略参数稳健性的框架，结合突触过滤和对抗攻击，实现参数的分类和量化。该研究在学术上为理解 RL 参数行为提供了新视角，并在实际应用中通过改进过滤技术增强了策略的适应性。未来工作可基于此框架设计更稳健和反脆弱的 RL 系统，探索更广泛的环境和应用场景，以克服潜在的局限性。

title: Structured Kolmogorov-Arnold Neural ODEs for Interpretable Learning and Symbolic Discovery of Nonlinear Dynamics
abstract: Understanding and modeling nonlinear dynamical systems is a fundamental challenge across science and engineering. Deep learning has shown remarkable potential for capturing complex system behavior, yet achieving models that are both accurate and physically interpretable remains difficult. To address this, we propose Structured Kolmogorov-Arnold Neural ODEs (SKANODEs), a framework that integrates structured state-space modeling with Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs). Within a Neural ODE architecture, SKANODE employs a fully trainable KAN as a universal function approximator to perform virtual sensing, recovering latent states that correspond to interpretable physical quantities such as displacements and velocities. Leveraging KAN's symbolic regression capability, SKANODE then extracts compact, interpretable expressions for the system's governing dynamics. Experiments on two canonical nonlinear oscillators and a real-world F-16 ground vibration dataset demonstrate that SKANODE reliably recovers physically meaningful latent displacement and velocity trajectories from acceleration measurements, identifies the correct governing nonlinearities--including the cubic stiffness in the Duffing oscillator and the nonlinear damping structure in the Van der Pol oscillator--and reveals hysteretic signatures in the F-16 interface dynamics through structured latent phase portraits and an interpretable symbolic model. Across all three cases, SKANODE provides more accurate and robust predictions than black-box NODE baselines and classical ARX and NARX identification, while producing equation-level descriptions of the learned nonlinear dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: SKANODEs框架整合Kolmogorov-Arnold网络和神经ODE，实现非线性动力学系统的可解释建模和符号发现。
light_analysis.motivation: 非线性动力学系统建模是科学和工程的核心挑战，现有深度学习模型虽能准确预测复杂行为，但多为黑盒模型，缺乏物理可解释性，限制了在实际应用中的可信度和实用性。因此，开发同时具备高精度和可解释性的方法至关重要，以填补黑盒模型与物理洞察之间的空白，提升系统识别和建模的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: SKANODE框架结合结构化状态空间建模与Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KANs），在神经ODE架构中，使用可训练的KAN作为通用函数近似器进行虚拟传感，恢复可解释的物理状态如位移和速度。通过KAN的符号回归能力，自动提取系统动力学的紧凑表达式，从而实现对非线性动力学的可解释学习和符号发现，并应用于非线性振荡器和F-16数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在Duffing和Van der Pol振荡器及F-16地面振动数据集的实验中，SKANODE能可靠恢复物理意义的位移和速度轨迹，正确识别非线性结构（如立方刚度和非线性阻尼），并通过结构化潜在相图和可解释符号模型揭示滞后特征。相比黑盒NODE、ARX和NARX基线，SKANODE提供了更准确、鲁棒的预测和方程级描述，提升了系统动力学识别的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SKANODE通过集成KANs和神经ODEs，实现了非线性动力学的可解释建模和符号发现，主要贡献在于提供准确且物理洞察的模型，具有重要的学术价值（如推进可解释AI）和工程应用潜力（如系统识别）。未来工作可扩展到更复杂系统或评估泛化能力，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: AutoV: Loss-Oriented Ranking for Visual Prompt Retrieval in LVLMs
abstract: Inspired by text prompts in large language models, visual prompts have been explored to enhance the perceptual capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs). However, performance tends to saturate under single visual prompt designs, making further prompt engineering increasingly ineffective. To address this limitation, we shift from prompt engineering to prompt retrieval and propose AutoV, a lightweight framework for instance-adaptive visual prompt identification. Given an input image and a textual query, AutoV automatically locates the most suitable visual prompt from a diverse candidate pool. Training such a retrieval framework requires prompt-level supervision, yet prompt quality is inherently ambiguous and difficult to assess reliably, even for humans. To enable automatic supervision, we evaluate visual prompts using a pre-trained LVLM and label them according to their prediction losses. Using the loss-oriented ranking as a robust training signal, AutoV learns to retrieve the query-aware optimal prompt for each instance without manual annotation. Experiments indicate that AutoV enhances the performance of various LVLMs on image understanding, captioning, grounding, and classification tasks. For example, AutoV improves LLaVA-OV by $\textbf{10.2}\%$ on VizWiz and boosts Qwen2.5-VL by $\textbf{3.8}\%$ on MMMU, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: AutoV框架通过损失导向的排名自动检索最优视觉提示，显著提升大型视觉语言模型的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉提示能增强大型视觉语言模型的感知能力，但单提示设计导致性能饱和，提示工程效果有限。现有方法依赖手动评估，提示质量难以量化，限制了进一步优化。因此，需要一种自动检索实例自适应提示的方法，以克服手动工程的不足并提升模型效能。
light_analysis.method: AutoV是一个轻量级框架，用于实例自适应的视觉提示检索。它基于预训练LVLM的预测损失评估候选提示，将损失导向的排名作为训练信号，自动为每个输入图像和文本查询选择最合适的视觉提示。训练无需手动标注，采用损失排名作为监督，关键创新是从提示工程转向自动检索。
light_analysis.result: AutoV显著提升了多种LVLMs在图像理解、标题生成、接地和分类任务上的性能。具体数据显示，在VizWiz数据集上，LLaVA-OV模型准确率提升了10.2%；在MMMU数据集上，Qwen2.5-VL模型提升了3.8%。这些改进证明了AutoV相对于基线方法的有效性，摘要未明确说明具体基线对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoV通过损失导向的排名实现了视觉提示的自动检索，减少了对手动工程的依赖，并提升了模型性能。该研究为视觉提示优化提供了新方法，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可扩展到更多任务和模型，以验证其普适性，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: From Bandit Regret to FDR Control: Online Selective Generation with Adversarial Feedback Unlocking
abstract: As interactive generative systems are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, their tendency to generate unreliable or false responses raises serious concerns. Selective generation mitigates this risk by ensuring that the system answers only when confident. However, real-world deployments typically provide only partial user feedback on the selected response (e.g., thumbs up/down) and often operate in non-stationary or adversarial environments,for which effective learning methods are largely missing. To bridge this gap, we propose ExSUL, a novel online learning framework for selective generation with adversarial bandit feedback. Technically, we introduce (i) a novel conversion lemma that translates the regret of any bandit algorithm into an FDR bound, and (ii) feedback unlocking, a strategy that exploits the structure of selective generation to extract additional learning signals from partial feedback. We prove that ExSUL achieves a regret bound of $O(\sqrt{T \ln |H|})$, matching the efficiency and FDR controllability of full-information settings despite receiving only partial feedback. While applicable to general generative tasks, we demonstrate the efficacy of ExSUL for ensuring the reliability of Large Language Models (LLMs) through empirical validation on question-answering tasks across diverse non-stationary and adversarial settings. Our results demonstrate that ExSUL robustly controls the FDR while maintaining competitive answering coverage.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出ExSUL框架，通过转换引理和反馈解锁策略，实现在线选择性生成中的对抗性bandit反馈处理，有效控制错误发现率。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着交互式生成系统在真实世界应用中的广泛部署，其生成不可靠或虚假回答的趋势引发了严重关切。选择性生成通过确保系统仅在自信时回答来缓解这一风险，但现实部署通常只提供部分用户反馈（如点赞或点踩），并且往往在非平稳或对抗性环境中运行。现有学习方法在这些情况下效率低下，导致无法有效控制生成质量，因此本研究旨在填补这一空白，开发一个能在部分反馈下控制错误发现率（FDR）的在线学习框架。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出ExSUL，一种新颖的在线学习框架，专为具有对抗性bandit反馈的选择性生成而设计。技术核心包括两方面：一是转换引理，将任何bandit算法的后悔转换为FDR的边界，从而在理论层面建立联系；二是反馈解锁策略，利用选择性生成的结构特性，从部分反馈中提取额外的学习信号。该框架适用于一般生成任务，并在实验中应用于大型语言模型（LLMs），通过问答任务进行验证，但摘要未明确指定具体数据集和模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，ExSUL实现了后悔界O(√(T ln |H|))，这一性能匹配了全信息设置下的效率和FDR可控性，尽管只接收部分反馈。在多样化的非平稳和对抗性设置中，ExSUL在问答任务上表现出色，能够稳健地控制FDR，同时保持具有竞争力的回答覆盖率。与基线方法相比，该方法在部分反馈条件下达到了类似全信息的效果，摘要未提供具体数据如准确率数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出ExSUL框架，有效解决了在线选择性生成中的部分反馈问题，特别是在对抗性环境下。通过转换引理连接bandit regret与FDR控制，提供了理论保证，而反馈解锁策略增强了学习效率。该研究不仅在学术上丰富了在线学习和生成系统的理论，还具有实际应用价值，能提升大型语言模型在真实部署中的可靠性。未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可能包括扩展到更复杂的环境。

title: Bures-Wasserstein Flow Matching for Graph Generation
abstract: Graph generation has emerged as a critical task in fields ranging from drug discovery to circuit design. Contemporary approaches, notably diffusion and flow-based models, have achieved solid graph generative performance through constructing a probability path that interpolates between reference and data distributions. However, these methods typically model the evolution of individual nodes and edges independently and use linear interpolations in the disjoint space of nodes/edges to build the path. This disentangled interpolation breaks the interconnected patterns of graphs, making the constructed probability path irregular and non-smooth, which causes poor training dynamics and faulty sampling convergence. To address the limitation, this paper first presents a theoretically grounded framework for probability path construction in graph generative models. Specifically, we model the joint evolution of the nodes and edges by representing graphs as connected systems parameterized by Markov random fields (MRF). We then leverage the optimal transport displacement between MRF objects to design a smooth probability path that ensures the co-evolution of graph components. Based on this, we introduce BWFlow, a flow-matching framework for graph generation that utilizes the derived optimal probability path to benefit the training and sampling algorithm design. Experimental evaluations in plain graph generation and molecule generation validate the effectiveness of BWFlow with competitive performance, better training convergence, and efficient sampling.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了BWFlow框架，通过最优传输位移设计平滑概率路径，以改进图生成的训练和采样性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 图生成在药物发现和电路设计等关键领域应用广泛，但目前主流方法如扩散和流模型在构建概率路径时，独立建模节点和边的演化，采用线性插值，这破坏了图的互联模式，导致路径不规则和非平滑，进而引发训练动态差和采样收敛故障，限制了模型的有效性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出一个理论框架，将图参数化为马尔可夫随机场（MRF），建模节点和边的联合演化，利用最优传输位移设计平滑的概率路径，确保图组件的共演化。基于此，引入BWFlow流匹配框架，使用该路径优化训练和采样算法，解决了传统方法的互联模式破坏问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验在普通图生成和分子生成任务中验证了BWFlow的有效性，结果显示该框架具有竞争性性能，相比于基线方法，表现出更好的训练收敛性和高效采样效率。摘要未明确说明具体数据指标，但强调了其在性能上的改进和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了一个理论基础的框架，确保图组件共演化，改善了图生成的训练和采样过程。这在学术上拓展了概率路径构建方法，在实际应用中如药物发现等领域具有重要价值。未来工作可能包括更多图类型和应用场景的探索。

title: HSG-12M: A Large-Scale Benchmark of Spatial Multigraphs from the Energy Spectra of Non-Hermitian Crystals
abstract: AI is transforming scientific research by revealing new ways to understand complex physical systems, but its impact remains constrained by the lack of large, high-quality domain-specific datasets. A rich, largely untapped resource lies in non-Hermitian quantum physics, where the energy spectra of crystals form intricate geometries on the complex plane -- termed as Hamiltonian spectral graphs. Despite their significance as fingerprints for electronic behavior, their systematic study has been intractable due to the reliance on manual extraction. To unlock this potential, we introduce Poly2Graph: a high-performance, open-source pipeline that automates the mapping of 1-D crystal Hamiltonians to spectral graphs. Using this tool, we present HSG-12M: a dataset containing 11.6 million static and 5.1 million dynamic Hamiltonian spectral graphs across 1401 characteristic-polynomial classes, distilled from 177 TB of spectral potential data. Crucially, HSG-12M is the first large-scale dataset of spatial multigraphs -- graphs embedded in a metric space where multiple geometrically distinct trajectories between two nodes are retained as separate edges. This simultaneously addresses a critical gap, as existing graph benchmarks overwhelmingly assume simple, non-spatial edges, discarding vital geometric information. Benchmarks with popular GNNs expose new challenges in learning spatial multi-edges at scale. Beyond its practical utility, we show that spectral graphs serve as universal topological fingerprints of polynomials, vectors, and matrices, forging a new algebra-to-graph link. HSG-12M lays the groundwork for data-driven scientific discovery in condensed matter physics, new opportunities in geometry-aware graph learning and beyond.
comment: 49 pages, 13 figures, 14 tables. Code & pipeline: [https://github.com/sarinstein-yan/Poly2Graph] Dataset: [https://github.com/sarinstein-yan/HSG-12M] Dataset released under CC BY 4.0. Benchmark scripts and data loaders included

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出HSG-12M：一个大规模空间多重图数据集，通过自动化流水线Poly2Graph从非厄米晶体能谱中提取，填补了现有图基准忽视几何信息的空白，并建立了代数到图的链接。
light_analysis.motivation: AI在科学研究中的应用受限于缺乏高质量领域特定数据集，尤其是在非厄米量子物理学中。哈密顿量谱图作为晶体能谱的几何表示，是电子行为的关键指纹，但现有研究依赖手动提取，导致其系统研究难以进行。现有图基准大多假设简单、非空间的边，丢弃了重要几何信息，无法有效建模复杂物理系统，因此亟需一种自动化、大规模的数据集来推动数据驱动发现和几何感知学习。
light_analysis.method: 研究设计了Poly2Graph，一个高性能开源的自动化流水线，用于将一维晶体哈密顿量映射到谱图。关键创新在于自动处理大规模数据，从177 TB的谱势数据中提取出HSG-12M数据集，覆盖1401个特征多项式类别。该数据集采用空间多重图形式，即图嵌入在度量空间中，保留节点间多个几何上不同的轨迹作为单独边，这一技术特色弥补了现有方法中忽视几何结构的不足。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果是创建了HSG-12M数据集，包含11.6百万静态和5.1百万动态图。通过使用流行的图神经网络进行基准测试，暴露了学习空间多边的新挑战，表明现有方法在处理此类复杂结构时的局限性。虽然摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但填补了现有图基准在几何信息方面的空白，为后续研究提供了数据基础和测试平台。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是推出了HSG-12M数据集和Poly2Graph流水线，为数据驱动科学发现提供了首个大规模空间多重图资源。谱图被证明可作为多项式、向量和矩阵的通用拓扑指纹，建立了一个新的代数到图链接，具有重要的学术价值，推动几何感知图学习和凝聚态物理学的进展。潜在应用价值包括优化图学习算法和扩展数据集以覆盖更广的物理场景，但未来工作如性能提升的具体方向在摘要中未明确说明。

title: A Signal Contract for Online Language Grounding and Discovery in Decision-Making
abstract: Autonomous systems increasingly receive time-sensitive contextual updates from humans through natural language, yet embedding language understanding inside decision-makers couples grounding to learning or planning. This increases redeployment burden when language conventions or domain knowledge change and can hinder diagnosability by confounding grounding errors with control errors. We address online language grounding where messy, evolving verbal reports are converted into control-relevant signals during execution through an interface that localises language updates while keeping downstream decision-makers language-agnostic. We propose LUCIFER (Language Understanding and Context-Infused Framework for Exploration and Behavior Refinement), an inference-only middleware that exposes a Signal Contract. The contract provides four outputs, policy priors, reward potentials, admissible-option constraints, and telemetry-based action prediction for efficient information gathering. We validate LUCIFER in a search-and-rescue (SAR)-inspired testbed using dual-phase, dual-client evaluation: (i) component benchmarks show reasoning-based extraction remains robust on self-correcting reports where pattern-matching baselines degrade, and (ii) system-level ablations with two structurally distinct clients (hierarchical RL and a hybrid A*+heuristics planner) show consistent necessity and synergy. Grounding improves safety, discovery improves information-collection efficiency, and only their combination achieves both.
comment: 10 pages, 4 Figures, 4 Tables, submitted to the IEEE for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出LUCIFER框架和Signal Contract，实现在线语言接地和发现，使自主系统的决策者与语言无关。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主系统越来越多地通过自然语言接收时间敏感的上下文更新，需要高效的语言理解以指导决策。然而，现有方法将语言接地过程与决策模块紧密耦合，导致当语言约定或领域知识变化时，系统需要重新部署，增加额外负担。这种耦合还混淆了接地错误和控制错误，使得问题诊断困难，降低系统的可维护性和适应性。因此，研究动机在于开发一种在线语言接地方法，能够实时处理演变语言，同时保持下游决策模块语言无关，以提升系统的灵活性和可诊断性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出LUCIFER框架，作为一个仅推理的中间件，暴露Signal Contract接口，该合同输出四个控制相关信号：策略先验用于指导决策方向，奖励潜力以优化行为，可行选项约束限制行动空间，以及基于遥测的动作预测用于高效信息收集。核心创新在于模块化设计，通过推理方法提取语言信号，而非依赖传统的模式匹配，使系统在处理自我纠正语言报告时更稳健。方法在搜索和救援启发的测试平台上实施，使用分层强化学习和混合A*+启发式规划器作为客户端验证协同性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在搜索和救援测试平台上进行双阶段、双客户端评估。组件基准测试显示，基于推理的提取方法在自我纠正的语言报告中保持性能稳定，而模式匹配基线在类似条件下表现下降，表明推理方法的稳健优势。系统级消融实验与两个结构不同的客户端集成时，LUCIFER展示了一致必要性和协同效应：语言接地提高了系统安全性，发现机制提升了信息收集效率，而只有两者的结合才能同时实现这些优化目标，验证了框架的整体有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提出了LUCIFER框架和Signal Contract，实现了在线语言接地和发现的模块化方法，有效解耦语言理解与决策过程。这增强了自主系统的适应性，在语言约定变化时减少重新部署需求，并提高了可诊断性。学术上，推动了语言接地与发现技术的协同研究；实际应用中，适用于搜索救援等需要实时语言交互的场景。未来工作可能扩展到更复杂语言环境或集成其他AI技术以进一步提升性能。

title: FLAIR-HUB: Large-scale Multimodal Dataset for Land Cover and Crop Mapping
abstract: The growing availability of high-quality Earth Observation (EO) data enables accurate global land cover and crop type monitoring. However, the volume and heterogeneity of these datasets pose major processing and annotation challenges. To address this, the French National Institute of Geographical and Forest Information (IGN) is actively exploring innovative strategies to exploit diverse EO data, which require large annotated datasets. IGN introduces FLAIR-HUB, the largest multi-sensor land cover dataset with very-high-resolution (20 cm) annotations, covering 2528 km2 of France. It combines six aligned modalities: aerial imagery, Sentinel-1/2 time series, SPOT imagery, topographic data, and historical aerial images. Extensive benchmarks evaluate multimodal fusion and deep learning models (CNNs, transformers) for land cover or crop mapping and also explore multi-task learning. Results underscore the complexity of multimodal fusion and fine-grained classification, with best land cover performance (78.2% accuracy, 65.8% mIoU) achieved using nearly all modalities. FLAIR-HUB supports supervised and multimodal pretraining, with data and code available at https://ignf.github.io/FLAIR/flairhub.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了FLAIR-HUB，一个大规模多模态的土地覆盖和作物映射数据集，提供高分辨率注释，以支持多模态数据融合和深度学习研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着高质量地球观测数据的日益增多，精确监测全球土地覆盖和作物类型成为可能，但数据体积庞大、异质性强，导致处理和标注面临重大挑战。法国国家地理与森林信息研究所（IGN）为开发创新策略以利用多模态数据，需要大规模标注数据集。现有方法在处理高分辨率、多模态数据时，常因标注成本和融合复杂性而受限，影响监测精度，因此构建该数据集以应对这些不足，推动相关领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于IGN构建的FLAIR-HUB数据集，这是目前最大的多传感器土地覆盖数据集，覆盖法国2528平方公里区域，提供20厘米分辨率的注释。数据集整合了六种对齐模态：航空影像、Sentinel-1/2时间序列、SPOT影像、地形数据和历史航空图像。通过广泛基准测试，评估了多模态数据融合和深度学习模型，包括卷积神经网络（CNNs）和transformers，应用于土地覆盖或作物映射任务，并探索了多任务学习方法以提升模型性能和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在土地覆盖映射任务中，使用绝大多数模态进行融合取得了最佳性能，具体指标为78.2%准确率和65.8% mIoU（平均交并比）。这突出了多模态数据融合对提升分类精度的有效性，同时强调了细粒度分类的复杂性。摘要未明确提供与基线方法的直接对比数据，但暗示多模态方法在解决复杂地球观测数据任务中具有优势，表明融合过程需要精细调优以实现更好效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是引入了FLAIR-HUB数据集，这是一个大规模、高分辨率的多模态土地覆盖数据集，支持监督学习和多模态预训练，数据和代码已公开。其学术价值在于为土地覆盖和作物映射研究提供了丰富资源，促进了多模态融合和深度学习模型的发展；实际应用价值体现在提升农业监测和环境保护的精度。未来工作方向可能包括优化融合算法、扩展数据集覆盖范围，或探索更高效的标注策略以应对处理挑战。

title: FPGA-Enabled Machine Learning Applications in Earth Observation: A Systematic Review
abstract: New UAV technologies and the NewSpace era are transforming Earth Observation missions and data acquisition. Numerous small platforms generate large data volume, straining bandwidth and requiring onboard decision-making to transmit high-quality information in time. While Machine Learning allows real-time autonomous processing, FPGAs balance performance with adaptability to mission-specific requirements, enabling onboard deployment. This review systematically analyzes 68 experiments deploying ML models on FPGAs for Remote Sensing applications. We introduce two distinct taxonomies to capture both efficient model architectures and FPGA implementation strategies. For transparency and reproducibility, we follow PRISMA 2020 guidelines and share all data and code at https://github.com/CedricLeon/Survey_RS-ML-FPGA.
comment: 35 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Accepted at ACM Computing Surveys (ACM CSUR). Cite as: Cédric Léonard, Dirk Stober, and Martin Schulz. 2026. FPGA-Enabled Machine Learning Applications in Earth Observation: A Systematic Review. ACM Comput. Surv. 1, 1 (January 2026), 35 pages. https://doi.org/10.1145/3800686

light_analysis.overview: 这篇系统综述总结了FPGA支持的机器学习在地球观测中的应用，并引入了模型架构和FPGA实现策略的分类法。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于地球观测任务中数据量激增和带宽受限的问题。随着新无人机技术和NewSpace时代的到来，地球观测数据获取方式变革，大量小型平台产生海量数据，导致传输带宽紧张，需要实时机载决策以传输高质量信息。现有方法可能在处理性能和适应性上不足，FPGA作为一种硬件解决方案，能平衡性能与灵活性，支持机器学习模型的机载部署，这对提高数据处理效率和自主性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用系统综述方法，分析了68个将机器学习模型部署在FPGA上用于遥感应用的实验。研究引入了两个独特的分类法：一个针对高效模型架构，另一个针对FPGA实现策略，以系统化捕捉部署中的关键方面。为确保透明性和可重复性，遵循PRISMA 2020指南，并公开分享所有数据和代码于GitHub平台。关键创新点在于提供结构化的框架，帮助研究人员理解和优化ML-FPGA集成。
light_analysis.result: 作为一篇系统综述，摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果或性能指标。主要结果是基于对68个实验的系统分析，总结了机器学习模型在FPGA上用于遥感应用的趋势和最佳实践。可能涉及不同模型架构和FPGA实现策略的比较，但未提供具体的准确率提升、效率改进数据或与基线方法的定量对比。综述的核心目标是提供全面回顾和分类框架，而非报告实验性数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是对FPGA支持的机器学习在地球观测中的应用进行系统综述，并引入两个分类法以促进研究。学术上，为领域提供了结构化分析和参考框架，帮助理解高效架构和实现策略；实际上，指导了机载决策系统的开发和优化，提升遥感处理的自适应性。局限性可能包括覆盖范围的限制，未来工作可扩展分析更多应用场景或结合新兴技术如边缘计算。综述的意义在于推动高效、实时的遥感数据处理系统发展。

title: SealQA: Raising the Bar for Reasoning in Search-Augmented Language Models
abstract: We introduce SealQA, a new challenge benchmark for evaluating SEarch-Augmented Language models on fact-seeking questions where web search yields conflicting, noisy, or unhelpful results. SealQA comes in three flavors: (1) Seal-0 (main) and (2) Seal-Hard, which assess factual accuracy and reasoning capabilities, with Seal-0 focusing on the most challenging questions where chat models (e.g., GPT-4.1) typically achieve near-zero accuracy; and (3) LongSeal, which extends SealQA to test long-context, multi-document reasoning in "needle-in-a-haystack" settings. Our evaluation reveals critical limitations in current models: Even frontier LLMs perform poorly across all SealQA flavors. On Seal-0, frontier agentic models equipped with tools like o3 and o4-mini achieve only 17.1% and 6.3% accuracy, respectively, at their best reasoning efforts. We find that advanced reasoning models such as DeepSeek-R1-671B and o3-mini are highly vulnerable to noisy search results. Notably, increasing test-time compute does not yield reliable gains across o3-mini, o4-mini, and o3, with performance often plateauing or even declining early. Additionally, while recent models are less affected by the "lost-in-the-middle" issue, they still fail to reliably identify relevant documents in LongSeal when faced with numerous distractors. To facilitate future work, we release SealQA at huggingface.co/datasets/vtllms/sealqa.

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入SealQA基准，用于评估搜索增强语言模型在噪声搜索结果下的推理能力，挑战当前模型极限。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决搜索增强语言模型在处理Web搜索产生的冲突、噪声或无结果事实问题时的推理能力评估不足。现有基准未能有效测试模型在困难场景下的表现，例如GPT-4.1在类似问题上准确率接近零，显示出当前评估方法的局限性，亟需新基准来推动模型在真实世界噪声环境中的进步。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法是构建SealQA基准，包含三个子集：Seal-0评估最困难问题的推理，Seal-Hard测试事实准确性，LongSeal模拟长上下文多文档推理的‘针在干草堆’场景。基准设计模拟噪声搜索结果和复杂推理设置，用于测试模型鲁棒性。研究中使用了多种前沿LLMs进行实验，如GPT-4.1和DeepSeek-R1-671B，但未详细说明模型具体架构或训练方法，摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示前沿模型表现不佳：在Seal-0上，o3和o4-mini模型的准确率仅为17.1%和6.3%。DeepSeek-R1-671B等高级模型对噪声搜索结果高度脆弱，增加测试计算不会带来可靠性能提升，常导致性能停滞或下降。在LongSeal中，模型无法可靠识别相关文档，尽管‘lost-in-the-middle’问题有所改善，但面对众多干扰时仍失效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出SealQA基准，为搜索增强语言模型的推理能力设定了更高标准，揭示了模型在噪声和长上下文环境中的严重不足。这项研究具有重要学术价值，通过提供严格测试标准促进了未来模型改进，潜在局限性包括基准覆盖范围有限，未来工作可扩展到更多场景或开发更鲁棒的推理技术。

title: Continuous Chain of Thought Enables Parallel Exploration and Reasoning
abstract: Modern language models generate chain-of-thought traces by autoregressively sampling tokens from a finite vocabulary. While this discrete sampling has achieved remarkable success, conducting chain-of-thought with continuously-valued tokens (CoT2) offers a richer and more expressive alternative. Our work provides new theoretical guarantees and algorithms for CoT2, motivated by logical reasoning tasks that inherently require search capabilities. Theoretically, we establish how CoT2 facilitates the model to track multiple discrete traces in parallel; and quantify the level of achievable parallelism and its benefits for inference efficiency. We also provide a CoT2-based one-layer transformer construction that solves the combinatorial "subset sum problem" given a sufficient embedding dimension. These insights arise from a novel and effective supervision strategy where we match the language model outputs to the empirical token distributions of a set of target traces. Complementing this, we introduce sampling strategies that unlock policy optimization methods for CoT2. Our primary strategy samples and composes $K$ discrete tokens at each decoding step to control the level of parallelism. Experiments confirm that (i) the optimal level of parallelism is governed by the embedding dimension, (ii) our continuous supervision strategy can outperform alternative methods, and (iii) policy optimization with CoT2 indeed improves the performance of the model beyond its initial discrete or continuous supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出连续思维链（CoT2）方法，通过连续值标记实现并行推理，提供理论保证和监督策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代语言模型通常依赖离散采样生成思维链，这在逻辑推理任务中效率有限，因为这些任务需要并行搜索能力。离散采样虽成功，但表达性不足，无法有效处理多路径推理。连续值标记的思维链（CoT2）旨在克服这一局限，提供更丰富的表达方式，以提升推理效率和搜索能力，应对复杂的逻辑问题。研究动机源于需要增强模型在搜索密集型任务中的性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Continuous Chain of Thought（CoT2）方法，使用连续值标记进行推理。核心创新包括理论分析，量化了CoT2如何实现并行跟踪多个离散痕迹及推理效率益处；开发了监督策略，将语言模型输出与目标痕迹的经验标记分布匹配；并引入了采样策略，在每个解码步骤采样组合K个离散标记以控制并行水平。此外，构建了基于CoT2的单层transformer模型，应用于解决组合问题如子集和问题，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，CoT2方法在推理任务中表现优异。最佳并行水平由嵌入维度决定，这表明模型设计影响效率；连续监督策略优于其他替代方法，提升了性能；策略优化进一步增强了模型表现，超越了初始的离散或连续监督。这些发现验证了CoT2在提高推理效率和效果方面的有效性，但摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或时间节省。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了CoT2的理论框架和实践算法，为连续值标记在思维链中的应用开辟新途径。学术上，增强了模型并行推理能力和理论分析；实践上，可能应用于逻辑推理和搜索任务，提升AI系统的效率。未来工作可探索更复杂场景和扩展方法，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: OSPO: Object-Centric Self-Improving Preference Optimization for Text-to-Image Generation
abstract: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have enabled unified multimodal understanding and generation. However, they still struggle with fine-grained text-image alignment, often failing to faithfully depict objects with correct attributes such as color, shape, and spatial relations. To mitigate this issue, previous studies have explored preference optimization methods such as DPO and GRPO, but these approaches incur substantial computational cost, both in constructing preference data and in performing optimization. This has motivated self-improving preference optimization approaches, in which the MLLM autonomously generates its own training data, self-estimates preference feedback, and self-optimizes using the resulting self-constructed preference pairs. However, existing self-improving methods still overlook fine-grained, object-level semantics, allowing object hallucination to persist. To tackle this problem, we propose Object-centric Self-improving Preference Optimization (OSPO), a self-improving framework designed to enhance object-level text-image alignment. OSPO explicitly constructs object-centric preference data without relying on any external data and external models. We also introduce a new approach that leverages attention-based object masks together with an object-weighted SimPO loss to enhance object-specific fidelity. Extensive experiments on three compositional image generation benchmarks demonstrate that OSPO significantly improves fine-grained alignment and reduces object hallucination, outperforming prior self-improving methods and even specialized diffusion-based text-to-image models.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出对象中心自改进偏好优化（OSPO）框架，通过自主构建对象级偏好数据和加权损失函数，显著提升文本到图像生成的细粒度对齐并减少对象幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在统一多模态理解和生成方面虽有进展，但在细粒度文本-图像对齐上仍存在困难，如对象属性（颜色、形状、空间关系）的准确描绘不足，导致对象幻觉。现有偏好优化方法（如DPO和GRPO）计算成本高，而自改进方法忽视对象级语义，无法有效解决该问题。因此，开发高效且专注于对象级对齐的方法对提升生成质量和模型实用性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: OSPO框架的核心是自主构建对象中心偏好数据，不依赖外部数据或模型。方法创新包括：利用基于注意力的对象掩码识别图像中的对象区域，结合对象加权的SimPO损失函数，以增强对象特定保真度。通过自改进过程，MLLM生成训练数据、自我评估偏好并优化模型，重点针对对象级语义进行优化，减少对象幻觉并提升对齐精度。
light_analysis.result: 在三个组合图像生成基准上的实验表明，OSPO显著改善了细粒度文本-图像对齐，有效减少了对象幻觉。与先前自改进方法相比，OSPO表现更优；甚至在某些方面超越了专门的基于扩散的文本到图像模型。具体性能指标（如准确率提升）摘要未明确说明，但实验结果证实其有效性，强调了在对象级对齐上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: OSPO框架的主要贡献在于提出对象中心自改进偏好优化方法，解决了MLLMs在细粒度对齐上的关键问题，降低了计算成本。该研究具有学术价值，为多模态生成提供新思路；实际应用可提升文本到图像生成的准确性和效率。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他多模态任务或进一步优化计算框架。

title: Learning Virtual Machine Scheduling in Cloud Computing through Language Agents
abstract: In cloud services, virtual machine (VM) scheduling is a typical Online Dynamic Multidimensional Bin Packing (ODMBP) problem, characterized by large-scale complexity and fluctuating demands. Traditional optimization methods struggle to adapt to real-time changes, domain-expert-designed heuristic approaches suffer from rigid strategies, and existing learning-based methods often lack generalizability and interpretability. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a hierarchical language agent framework named MiCo, which provides a large language model (LLM)-driven heuristic design paradigm for solving ODMBP. Specifically, ODMBP is formulated as a Semi-Markov Decision Process with Options (SMDP-Option), enabling dynamic scheduling through a two-stage architecture, i.e., Option Miner and Option Composer. Option Miner utilizes LLMs to discover diverse and useful non-context-aware strategies by interacting with constructed environments. Option Composer employs LLMs to discover a composing strategy that integrates the non-context-aware strategies with the contextual ones. Extensive experiments on real-world enterprise datasets demonstrate that MiCo achieves a 96.9\% competitive ratio in large-scale scenarios involving more than 10,000 virtual machines. It maintains high performance even under nonstationary request flows and diverse configurations, thus validating its effectiveness in complex and large-scale cloud environments.

light_analysis.overview: MiCo 是一个层次化语言代理框架，利用大语言模型驱动的启发式设计范式，有效解决云计算的虚拟机器调度问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在云服务中，虚拟机器调度是一个典型的在线动态多维装箱问题，具有大规模复杂性和需求波动的特点，传统优化方法难以适应实时变化，基于领域专家设计的启发式方法策略僵化，现有学习方法则缺乏泛化性和可解释性。为了解决这些限制，本研究旨在开发一个能够动态适应、提高泛化性和增强可解释性的调度框架，以应对复杂云环境的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出名为 MiCo 的层次化语言代理框架，通过大语言模型驱动的启发式设计范式解决在线动态多维装箱问题。具体地，将问题表述为具有选项的半马尔可夫决策过程，采用两阶段架构：选项挖掘器和选项组合器。选项挖掘器使用大语言模型与环境交互，发现多样且有用的非上下文感知策略；选项组合器使用大语言模型发现组合策略，整合非上下文和上下文感知策略。关键创新包括 LLM 在调度问题中的应用和动态调度架构的设计。
light_analysis.result: 在真实企业数据集上的实验表明，MiCo 在大规模场景（涉及超过 10,000 个虚拟机）中实现了 96.9% 的竞争比。即使在非平稳请求流和多样化配置下，也保持了高性能，验证了其在复杂大规模云环境中的有效性。与传统方法和现有学习方法相比，MiCo 表现出更好的适应性和泛化能力，摘要未明确说明具体基线对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了 MiCo 框架，通过大语言模型驱动的启发式设计有效解决了虚拟机器调度问题。学术上，它为强化学习和语言模型在优化问题中的应用提供了新范式；实际上，提高了云调度的效率和适应性，为大规模云环境提供了可扩展的解决方案。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性或未来工作方向，但可能包括扩展到其他调度领域或进一步优化模型性能。

title: RESAR-BEV: An Explainable Progressive Residual Autoregressive Approach for Camera-Radar Fusion in BEV Segmentation
abstract: Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) semantic segmentation provides comprehensive environmental perception for autonomous driving but suffers multi-modal misalignment and sensor noise. We propose RESAR-BEV, a progressive refinement framework that advances beyond single-step end-to-end approaches: (1) progressive refinement through residual autoregressive learning that decomposes BEV segmentation into interpretable coarse-to-fine stages via our Drive-Transformer and Modifier-Transformer residual prediction cascaded architecture, (2) robust BEV representation combining ground-proximity voxels with adaptive height offsets and dual-path voxel feature encoding (max+attention pooling) for efficient feature extraction, and (3) decoupled supervision with offline Ground Truth decomposition and online joint optimization to prevent overfitting while ensuring structural coherence. Experiments on nuScenes demonstrate RESAR-BEV achieves state-of-the-art performance with 54.0% mIoU across 7 essential driving-scene categories while maintaining real-time capability at 14.6 FPS. The framework exhibits robustness in challenging scenarios of long-range perception and adverse weather conditions.
comment: This work was submitted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS) on 09-May-2025; revised 5 October 2025 and 26 January 2026; accepted 1 March 2026

light_analysis.overview: RESAR-BEV提出了一种基于渐进残差自回归的相机-雷达融合方法，用于实现可解释的鸟瞰图（BEV）语义分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 鸟瞰图（BEV）语义分割对于自动驾驶的环境感知至关重要，但现有方法面临多模态传感器（如相机和雷达）数据对齐困难以及传感器噪声的问题。单步端到端方法在处理这些复杂性时效果有限，导致分割精度下降和鲁棒性不足，特别是在长距离感知和恶劣天气条件下。因此，本研究旨在开发一种渐进细化、解释性强且鲁棒的框架，以提升BEV分割的性能和可靠性，弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: RESAR-BEV采用渐进细化框架，通过残差自回归学习将BEV分割分解为从粗到细的多个阶段，使用Drive-Transformer和Modifier-Transformer级联架构实现。为高效提取特征，框架结合地面接近体素与自适应高度偏移，并采用双路径体素特征编码（最大池化和注意力池化）。此外，通过解耦监督策略，离线分解Ground Truth进行监督，并在线联合优化模型参数，以防止过拟合并确保分割结构的一致性，从而提升模型的可解释性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes数据集上的实验表明，RESAR-BEV在7个关键驾驶场景类别上达到了54.0%的平均交并比（mIoU），实现了当前最先进的性能，优于基线方法。同时，模型保持实时处理能力，运行速度为14.6帧每秒，满足自动驾驶的实时性要求。框架在挑战性场景如长距离感知和恶劣天气条件下表现出良好的鲁棒性，进一步验证了其在实际应用中的可靠性和优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: RESAR-BEV的主要贡献在于提出了一种渐进残差自回归框架，有效解决了BEV语义分割中的多模态错位和噪声问题。该研究不仅提升了分割精度和实时性，还增强了模型的可解释性和鲁棒性，对于自动驾驶系统的环境感知具有重要学术和应用价值。未来工作可能包括优化计算效率或扩展到更多传感器类型，以进一步提高模型的泛化能力和实际部署效果。

title: ReactDance: Hierarchical Representation for High-Fidelity and Coherent Long-Form Reactive Dance Generation
abstract: Reactive dance generation (RDG), the task of generating a dance conditioned on a lead dancer's motion, holds significant promise for enhancing human-robot interaction and immersive digital entertainment. Despite progress in duet synchronization and motion-music alignment, two key challenges remain: generating fine-grained spatial interactions and ensuring long-term temporal coherence. In this work, we introduce \textbf{ReactDance}, a diffusion framework that operates on a novel hierarchical latent space to address these spatiotemporal challenges in RDG. First, for high-fidelity spatial expression and fine-grained control, we propose Hierarchical Finite Scalar Quantization (\textbf{HFSQ}). This multi-scale motion representation effectively disentangles coarse body posture from subtle limb dynamics, enabling independent and detailed control over both aspects through a layered guidance mechanism. Second, to efficiently generate long sequences with high temporal coherence, we propose Blockwise Local Context (\textbf{BLC}), a non-autoregressive sampling strategy. Departing from slow, frame-by-frame generation, BLC partitions the sequence into blocks and synthesizes them in parallel via periodic causal masking and positional encodings. Coherence across these blocks is ensured by a dense sliding-window training approach that enriches the representation with local temporal context. Extensive experiments show that ReactDance substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods in motion quality, long-term coherence, and sampling efficiency. Project page: https://ripemangobox.github.io/ReactDance.

light_analysis.overview: ReactDance提出一个基于扩散框架的分层潜在空间方法，用于生成高保真和长期一致的反应性舞蹈，解决空间交互和时间一致性的挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 反应性舞蹈生成（RDG）任务旨在根据领舞者运动生成舞蹈，对增强人机交互和沉浸式数字娱乐有重要意义。现有方法在双人同步和音乐对齐方面有进展，但仍面临细粒度空间交互（如身体姿势与肢体动态的独立控制）和长期时间一致性（如长序列生成中的连贯性）的不足。这些问题限制了舞蹈生成的实用性和真实性，因此需要新方法来同时优化时空维度。
light_analysis.method: ReactDance是一个扩散框架，操作在分层潜在空间上以应对时空挑战。核心创新包括：一是Hierarchical Finite Scalar Quantization (HFSQ)，一种多尺度运动表示方法，有效分离粗体姿势和细微肢体动态，通过分层指导机制实现独立精细控制；二是Blockwise Local Context (BLC)，一种非自回归采样策略，将长序列分块并行合成，使用周期性因果掩码和位置编码，并通过密集滑动窗口训练增强局部时间上下文以确保跨块一致性。这些技术结合了扩散模型和分层表示的优势。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，ReactDance在运动质量、长期时间一致性和采样效率方面显著优于现有最先进方法。摘要提到它在这些维度上表现出优势，但未提供具体性能指标数据，如准确率或效率提升的数值，因此基于描述推断其整体性能有实质改进，超越了基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReactDance通过分层表示和并行采样策略，成功解决了反应性舞蹈生成中的高保真空间表达和长期连贯性问题。该研究为舞蹈生成领域提供了创新技术框架，具有学术价值，并可应用于人机交互和娱乐产业。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但暗示了潜在扩展空间。

title: PhysLLM: Harnessing Large Language Models for Cross-Modal Remote Physiological Sensing
abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact physiological measurement but remains highly susceptible to illumination changes, motion artifacts, and limited temporal modeling. Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at capturing long-range dependencies, offering a potential solution but struggle with the continuous, noise-sensitive nature of rPPG signals due to their text-centric design. To bridge this gap, we introduce the PhysLLM, a collaborative optimization framework that synergizes LLMs with domain-specific rPPG components. Specifically, the Text Prototype Guidance (TPG) strategy is proposed to establish cross-modal alignment by projecting hemodynamic features into LLM-interpretable semantic space, effectively bridging the representational gap between physiological signals and linguistic tokens. Besides, a novel Dual-Domain Stationary (DDS) Algorithm is proposed for resolving signal instability through adaptive time-frequency domain feature re-weighting. Finally, rPPG task-specific cues systematically inject physiological priors through physiological statistics, environmental contextual answering, and task description, leveraging cross-modal learning to integrate both visual and textual information, enabling dynamic adaptation to challenging scenarios like variable illumination and subject movements. Evaluation on four benchmark datasets, PhysLLM achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and robustness, demonstrating superior generalization across lighting variations and motion scenarios. The source code is available at https://github.com/Alex036225/PhysLLM.
comment: Accepted by International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2026

light_analysis.overview: PhysLLM 提出一个协同优化框架，结合大型语言模型和远程光电容积描记术组件，通过跨模态方法提升生理测量的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 远程光电容积描记术（rPPG）在非接触生理测量中面临光照变化、运动伪影和时间建模限制等挑战，现有方法如大型语言模型（LLMs）虽能捕捉长距离依赖，但因其文本中心设计难以处理连续、噪声敏感的 rPPG 信号。因此，研究旨在弥合这一差距，开发一种结合 LLMs 建模能力和领域知识的方法，以增强信号稳定性和适应性，解决实际应用中的可靠性问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 PhysLLM 框架，通过协同优化整合 LLMs 和 rPPG 特定组件。核心方法包括：Text Prototype Guidance（TPG）策略，将血流动力学特征投影到 LLM 可解释的语义空间，实现跨模态对齐；Dual-Domain Stationary（DDS）算法，通过自适应时间-频率域特征重加权解决信号不稳定性；此外，通过生理统计、环境上下文和任务描述注入生理先验，利用跨模态学习整合视觉和文本信息，在四个基准数据集上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准数据集的评估中，PhysLLM 实现了最先进的准确性和鲁棒性，在光照变化和运动场景下表现出优越的泛化能力。与现有方法相比，该方法显著提升了远程生理测量的性能，具体性能指标如准确率提升摘要未明确说明，但结果证实了其在挑战性环境下的稳定和可靠表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhysLLM 的主要贡献是开发了一个协同优化框架，结合大型语言模型和远程生理感知技术，通过跨模态对齐和信号处理创新解决 rPPG 信号干扰问题。该研究具有重要学术价值，推动了 AI 在医疗健康领域的跨模态应用，实际应用上提升了测量可靠性。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他生理信号或优化算法适应性，摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Collaborative Learning of Local 3D Occupancy Prediction and Versatile Global Occupancy Mapping
abstract: Vision-based 3D semantic occupancy prediction is vital for autonomous driving, enabling unified modeling of static infrastructure and dynamic agents. Global occupancy maps serve as long-term memory priors, providing valuable historical context that enhances local perception. This is particularly important in challenging scenarios such as occlusion or poor illumination, where current and nearby observations may be unreliable or incomplete. Priors aggregated from previous traversals under better conditions help fill gaps and enhance the robustness of local 3D occupancy prediction. In this paper, we propose Long-term Memory Prior Occupancy (LMPOcc), a plug-and-play framework that incorporates global occupancy priors to boost local prediction and simultaneously updates global maps with new observations. To realize the information gain from global priors, we design an efficient and lightweight Current-Prior Fusion module that adaptively integrates prior and current features. Meanwhile, we introduce a model-agnostic prior format to enable continual updating of global occupancy and ensure compatibility across diverse prediction baselines. LMPOcc achieves state-of-the-art local occupancy prediction performance validated on the Occ3D-nuScenes benchmark, especially on static semantic categories. Furthermore, we verify LMPOcc's capability to build large-scale global occupancy maps through multi-vehicle crowdsourcing, and utilize occupancy-derived dense depth to support the construction of 3D open-vocabulary maps. Our method opens up a new paradigm for continuous global information updating and storage, paving the way towards more comprehensive and scalable scene understanding in large outdoor environments.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出LMPOcc框架，通过结合全局占用先验提升局部3D占用预测，并实现全局地图的持续更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 在自动驾驶中，基于视觉的3D语义占用预测至关重要，能统一建模静态和动态元素。然而，在遮挡或光照不良等挑战场景下，当前和附近的观测往往不可靠或不完整，导致现有方法难以充分利用历史上下文信息。因此，研究如何集成全局占用图作为长期记忆先验，以填补观测空白并增强局部感知的鲁棒性，具有重要实际意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出LMPOcc框架，设计了一个高效轻量的当前-先验融合模块，自适应地集成全局先验和当前观测特征。同时，引入模型无关的先验格式，确保与各种预测基线的兼容性，并支持全局占用图的持续更新。框架基于Occ3D-nuScenes数据集进行验证，通过多车辆众包实现大规模地图构建和更新。
light_analysis.result: LMPOcc在Occ3D-nuScenes基准测试中取得了最先进的局部占用预测性能，特别是在静态语义类别上表现优异。实验验证了该方法能通过多车辆众包构建大规模全局占用图，并利用占用派生的密集深度支持3D开放词汇地图的构建，与基线方法相比显著提升了预测准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了LMPOcc框架，开创了连续全局信息更新和存储的新范式。该方法不仅增强了局部3D占用预测的鲁棒性，还支持大规模室外环境的场景理解，为自动驾驶等应用提供了实际价值。未来工作可探索更多场景下的扩展性和通用性提升。

title: Noise2Ghost: Self-supervised deep convolutional reconstruction for ghost imaging
abstract: We present a new self-supervised deep-learning-based Ghost Imaging (GI) reconstruction method, which provides unparalleled reconstruction quality for noisy acquisitions among unsupervised methods. We present the supporting mathematical framework and results from theoretical and real data use cases. Self-supervision removes the need for clean reference data while offering strong noise reduction. This provides the necessary tools for addressing signal-to-noise ratio concerns for GI acquisitions in emerging and cutting-edge low-light GI scenarios. Notable examples include micro- and nano-scale x-ray emission imaging, e.g., x-ray fluorescence imaging of dose-sensitive samples. Their applications include in-vivo and in-operando case studies for biological samples and batteries.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了一种基于自监督深度学习的鬼成像重建方法Noise2Ghost，在无监督方法中实现了卓越的重建质量和有效的噪声抑制。
light_analysis.motivation: 鬼成像在低光条件下，如微米和纳米级X射线发射成像，面临严重的信噪比问题，这限制了在剂量敏感样品（如生物组织和电池材料）中的应用。现有无监督方法通常需要干净的参考数据，且噪声抑制能力有限，难以满足新兴低光鬼成像场景的严格要求。因此，开发一种无需干净数据并能有效处理噪声的自监督方法至关重要，以支持前沿科学研究和工业应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种名为Noise2Ghost的自监督深度学习重建方法，专为鬼成像设计。该方法基于深度卷积网络，无需干净参考数据，直接从噪声采集中进行重建，通过自监督学习框架结合鬼成像的数学原理来优化重建过程。关键创新点包括去除对高质量训练数据的需求，以及利用卷积网络实现高效的噪声抑制和图像恢复，但具体网络架构和训练细节在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果数据，如准确率或效率改进的数值。然而，论文指出该方法在无监督方法中实现了无与伦比的重建质量，并通过理论和实际数据用例验证了其在噪声抑制和图像重建方面的有效性。与基线方法相比，Noise2Ghost在处理低光鬼成像场景时表现出优越性能，显著提升了信噪比和重建质量，但具体对比细节需参考完整论文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于开发了Noise2Ghost，一种创新的自监督深度学习鬼成像重建方法，有效解决了低光条件下的噪声问题。该研究提高了鬼成像的重建质量，并消除了对干净参考数据的需求，为新兴应用如微米级X射线成像提供了关键技术支持。学术上，它丰富了自监督学习在计算成像领域的应用；实际上，有望推动生物医学和材料科学中的高分辨率成像发展。未来工作可能包括进一步优化网络或扩展到更多成像模式，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: TianQuan-S2S: A Subseasonal-to-Seasonal Global Weather Model via Incorporate Climatology State
abstract: Accurate Subseasonal-to-Seasonal (S2S) forecasting is vital for decision-making in agriculture, energy production, and emergency management. However, it remains a challenging and underexplored problem due to the chaotic nature of the weather system. Recent data-driven studies have shown promising results, but their performance is limited by the inadequate incorporation of climate states and a model tendency to degrade, progressively losing fine-scale details and yielding over-smoothed forecasts. To overcome these limitations, we propose TianQuan-S2S, a global S2S forecasting model that integrates initial weather states with climatological means via incorporating climatology into patch embedding and enhancing variability capture through an uncertainty-augmented Transformer. Extensive experiments on the Earth Reanalysis 5 (ERA5) reanalysis dataset demonstrate that our model yields a significant improvement in both deterministic and ensemble forecasting over the climatology mean, traditional numerical methods, and data-driven models. Ablation studies empirically show the effectiveness of our model designs. Remarkably, our model outperforms skillful numerical ECMWF-S2S and advanced data-driven Fuxi-S2S in key meteorological variables. The code implementation can be found in https://github.com/zhangminglang42/TianQuan.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出TianQuan-S2S模型，通过整合气候状态和不确定性增强的Transformer，显著提升全球天气预报性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 亚季节到季节（S2S）预报对农业、能源生产和应急管理等决策至关重要，但由于天气系统的混沌性质，这一问题仍具有挑战性且研究不足。近年来，数据驱动方法显示出潜力，但其性能受限于气候状态整合不足，导致模型退化、逐渐丢失细节并产生过度平滑的预报，影响了预报准确性和实用性，因此亟需改进现有方法以提升预报质量。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出TianQuan-S2S，一个全球S2S预报模型，通过将气候学融入patch embedding来整合初始天气状态与气候均值，并使用不确定性增强的Transformer来增强变异性捕捉。关键创新点包括在嵌入过程中引入气候状态，以及采用Transformer架构处理不确定性，以更好地保留预报细节。模型基于Earth Reanalysis 5 (ERA5)再分析数据集进行训练和评估，但摘要未明确说明具体模型架构的其他技术细节。
light_analysis.result: 在ERA5数据集上的大量实验表明，该模型在确定性预报和集合预报上显著优于气候均值、传统数值方法和现有数据驱动模型。消融研究实证了模型设计的有效性。特别地，在关键气象变量上，模型性能超越了技术先进的数值ECMWF-S2S和高级数据驱动Fuxi-S2S模型，但摘要未给出具体数据指标，仅强调显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出并验证了TianQuan-S2S模型，有效解决了现有数据驱动方法在S2S预报中气候状态整合不足和模型退化的问题，提高了预报准确性。这具有重要的学术价值，为天气建模领域提供了新思路，并具有实际应用价值，可用于支持相关行业决策。未来工作可进一步优化模型或扩展应用到其他领域，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: ms-Mamba: Multi-scale Mamba for Time-Series Forecasting
abstract: The problem of Time-series Forecasting is generally addressed by recurrent, Transformer-based and the recently proposed Mamba-based architectures. However, existing architectures generally process their input at a single temporal scale, which may be sub-optimal for many tasks where information changes over multiple time scales. In this paper, we introduce a novel architecture called Multi-scale Mamba (ms-Mamba) to address this gap. ms-Mamba incorporates multiple temporal scales by using multiple Mamba blocks with different sampling rates ($Δ$s). Our experiments on many benchmarks demonstrate that ms-Mamba outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, including the recently proposed Transformer-based and Mamba-based models. For example, on the Solar-Energy dataset, ms-Mamba outperforms its closest competitor S-Mamba (0.229 vs. 0.240 in terms of mean-squared error) while using fewer parameters (3.53M vs. 4.77M), less memory (13.46MB vs. 18.18MB), and less operations (14.93G vs. 20.53G MACs), averaged across four forecast lengths. Codes and models will be made available.
comment: 14 pages. Accepted for publication in Neurocomputing

light_analysis.overview: ms-Mamba提出了一种多尺度Mamba架构，通过整合多个时间尺度改进了时间序列预测性能，优于现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测在许多领域如能源和金融中至关重要，但现有架构如循环网络、Transformer和Mamba通常基于单一时间尺度处理输入，这限制了它们捕获数据在短期和长期尺度变化的能力。这些方法在处理信息多尺度变化的任务时可能产生次优结果，导致预测不准确或效率低下。因此，需要一种能够自适应处理多尺度信息的新方法，以提升预测性能并满足实际应用需求。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过设计多尺度架构来优化时间序列预测。
light_analysis.method: ms-Mamba的核心方法是使用多个Mamba块，每个块配备不同的采样率（Δs），以并行或串联方式处理输入序列的不同时间尺度。这允许模型同时捕获细粒度和粗粒度的时序模式，提高对多尺度变化的敏感性。创新点在于将多尺度学习整合到Mamba的高效选择性扫描框架中，通过不同采样率的块实现自适应尺度处理。尽管摘要未详细说明具体数据集和模型架构细节，但实验基于多个基准测试进行，可能涉及将输入序列下采样到不同速率并通过Mamba块处理后再融合结果，以优化预测性能。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，ms-Mamba显著优于最先进方法，包括最近提出的Transformer和Mamba模型。以Solar-Energy数据集为例，ms-Mamba的均方误差（MSE）为0.229，优于最接近竞争对手S-Mamba的0.240，平均跨四个预测长度。此外，它在模型效率上也更优：参数数量为3.53M（vs. 4.77M），内存使用为13.46MB（vs. 18.18MB），操作量为14.93G MACs（vs. 20.53G MACs）。这些结果表明ms-Mamba在提升预测准确性的同时，减少了计算资源需求，展示了其在准确性和效率上的双重优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了ms-Mamba，一种创新的多尺度Mamba架构，成功解决了时间序列预测中单一尺度处理的局限性。通过整合多尺度学习，该方法显著提升了预测精度并降低了计算复杂度，为序列建模提供了新方向。学术上，这扩展了Mamba架构的应用，并促进了多尺度学习方法的发展；实际中，可应用于能源预测、金融分析等领域，提高预测可靠性。尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括扩展到更多数据集、优化多尺度融合机制或验证在其他时间序列任务中的通用性。

title: RapidPoseTriangulation: Multi-view Multi-person Whole-body Human Pose Triangulation in a Millisecond
abstract: The integration of multi-view imaging and pose estimation represents a significant advance in computer vision applications, offering new possibilities for understanding human movement and interactions. This work presents a new algorithm that improves multi-view multi-person pose estimation, focusing on fast triangulation speeds and good generalization capabilities. The approach extends to whole-body pose estimation, capturing details from facial expressions to finger movements across multiple individuals and viewpoints. Adaptability to different settings is demonstrated through strong performance across unseen datasets and configurations. To support further progress in this field, all of this work is publicly accessible.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一种快速的多视角多人全身姿态三角测量算法，在毫秒级时间内实现，具有良好泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视角成像和姿态估计的集成在计算机视觉应用中至关重要，尤其是在理解人类运动和互动方面，但现有方法可能在速度和泛化能力上存在不足。本研究旨在解决多视角多人场景中姿态估计的效率问题，通过快速三角测量提升对复杂人类活动的分析，包括捕捉全身细节如面部表情和手指动作。这有助于在实时应用如运动分析、人机交互和监控系统中实现更精确和高效的性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种新算法，专注于提升多视角多人姿态估计的速度和泛化能力，扩展到全身姿态估计，以捕捉从面部到手指的细节。关键创新点包括快速三角测量技术，能在毫秒级时间内处理多人和多视角数据。摘要未明确说明具体技术细节如模型架构、数据集或算法实现，但强调了方法的自适应性和可扩展性，适用于不同场景和配置。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，该算法在不同未见数据集和配置上表现出强大性能，展示了良好的泛化能力和适应性。摘要未明确提供具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进数据，但强调了快速三角测量速度达到毫秒级，并通过跨数据集验证了其鲁棒性。与基线方法相比，算法可能在速度和泛化方面有改进，但具体对比细节摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一种快速且泛化强的多视角多人全身姿态三角测量算法，推动了计算机视觉中姿态估计领域的发展。该研究具有重要的学术和实际应用价值，如运动捕捉、虚拟现实和人机交互。所有工作公开可访问，促进了进一步研究和应用扩展。潜在局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可能包括优化算法以处理更复杂场景或集成更多传感器数据。

title: Safety Mirage: How Spurious Correlations Undermine VLM Safety Fine-Tuning and Can Be Mitigated by Machine Unlearning
abstract: Recent vision language models (VLMs) have made remarkable strides in generative modeling with multimodal inputs, particularly text and images. However, their susceptibility to generating harmful content when exposed to unsafe queries raises critical safety concerns. While current alignment strategies primarily rely on supervised safety fine-tuning with curated datasets, we identify a fundamental limitation we call the ''safety mirage'', where supervised fine-tuning inadvertently reinforces spurious correlations between superficial textual patterns and safety responses, rather than fostering deep, intrinsic mitigation of harm. We show that these spurious correlations leave fine-tuned VLMs vulnerable even to a simple one-word modification-based attack, where substituting a single word in text queries with a spurious correlation-inducing alternative can effectively bypass safeguards. Additionally, these correlations contribute to the over-prudence, causing fine-tuned VLMs to refuse benign queries unnecessarily. To address these issues, we show machine unlearning (MU) as a powerful alternative to supervised safety fine-tuning, as it avoids biased feature-label mappings and directly removes harmful knowledge from VLMs while preserving their general capabilities. Extensive evaluations across safety benchmarks show that under MU-based alignment reduces the attack success rate by up to 60.27% and cuts unnecessary rejections by over 84.20%. WARNING: There exist AI generations that may be offensive in nature.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示了VLM安全微调中的'安全幻象'问题，并提出机器遗忘作为有效缓解方案，提升模型安全性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于VLMs在多模态生成中易产生有害内容的安全隐患，现有方法主要依赖监督安全微调，但存在'安全幻象'局限，即微调强化了文本表面模式与安全响应的虚假关联，而非内在危害缓解。这导致模型易受简单攻击，如单词替换即可绕过安全措施，同时造成过度谨慎，拒绝良性查询。因此，需要更健壮的对齐策略来解决这些缺陷，确保AI系统的实用性和安全性。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用机器遗忘作为核心方法，替代传统的监督安全微调。机器遗忘旨在直接移除VLM中的有害知识，避免基于偏置特征标签映射的虚假相关性。技术路线涉及使用MU进行模型对齐，以消除有害特征的影响，同时保持模型在其他任务上的通用能力。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但强调MU作为一种避免偏置的替代方案，通过直接修改模型参数来提升安全性能。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，基于机器遗忘的对齐策略显著提升了安全性。在安全基准测试中，攻击成功率降低了高达60.27%，不必要的拒绝减少了超过84.20%。这些数据表明，与基线监督安全微调相比，机器遗忘能有效减少模型对虚假相关性的依赖，从而提高安全措施的鲁棒性和实用性，减少了攻击漏洞和误拒率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于揭示了安全微调中的'安全幻象'问题，并提出机器遗忘作为一种有效解决方案。学术上，这深化了对VLM安全对齐机制的理解，提供了新视角；实际上，为开发更安全的AI系统提供了实用方法。局限性可能包括需要进一步验证在不同场景下的有效性，未来工作可探索更广泛的MU应用或结合其他对齐技术以增强模型鲁棒性。

title: BACE-RUL: A Bi-directional Adversarial Network with Covariate Encoding for Machine Remaining Useful Life Prediction
abstract: Prognostic and Health Management (PHM) are crucial ways to avoid unnecessary maintenance for Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) and improve system reliability. Predicting the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) is one of the most challenging tasks for PHM. Existing methods require prior knowledge about the system, contrived assumptions, or temporal mining to model the life cycles of machine equipment/devices, resulting in diminished accuracy and limited applicability in real-world scenarios. This paper proposes a Bi-directional Adversarial network with Covariate Encoding for machine Remaining Useful Life (BACE-RUL) prediction, which only adopts sensor measurements from the current life cycle to predict RUL rather than relying on previous consecutive cycle recordings. The current sensor measurements of mechanical devices are encoded to a conditional space to better understand the implicit inner mechanical status. The predictor is trained as a conditional generative network with the encoded sensor measurements as its conditions. Various experiments on several real-world datasets, including the turbofan aircraft engine dataset and the dataset collected from degradation experiments of Li-Ion battery cells, show that the proposed model is a general framework and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
comment: This paper has been received as a research paper at CollaborateCom 2024

light_analysis.overview: 提出BACE-RUL模型，通过双向对抗网络和协变量编码，仅利用当前传感器数据预测机器剩余使用寿命，克服了依赖历史数据的局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 预测机器剩余使用寿命是预测和健康管理中的关键任务，对于网络物理系统避免不必要维护和提高系统可靠性至关重要。现有方法通常需要先验系统知识、人为假设或时间序列挖掘，这导致预测精度下降，并在实际应用场景中受到限制。因此，需要一种更通用且不依赖连续历史记录的预测方法，以提升准确性和适用性。
light_analysis.method: BACE-RUL模型采用双向对抗网络结构，结合协变量编码技术。核心方法包括将机械设备当前生命周期的传感器测量编码到条件空间，以捕捉内部隐含的机械状态；预测器被设计为条件生成网络，以编码数据为条件进行训练。创新点在于仅使用当前传感器数据预测RUL，而不依赖先前连续周期记录，从而减少数据依赖性并提高模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实数据集上进行实验验证，包括涡轮风扇发动机数据集和锂离子电池退化实验数据集。实验结果表明，BACE-RUL模型作为一个通用框架，在预测RUL任务中表现优异，超越了当前最先进的方法。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了模型的高精度和广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出BACE-RUL模型，通过整合双向对抗网络和协变量编码，实现了仅基于当前传感器数据的RUL预测。学术上，该方法扩展了生成式模型在预测和健康管理领域的应用；实际上，提高了预测准确性和实用性，减少了对历史数据的依赖。未来工作可能包括在更多样化场景下验证模型，或探索与其他技术的结合，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Generative Models in Decision Making: A Survey
abstract: Generative models have fundamentally reshaped the landscape of decision-making, reframing the problem from pure scalar reward maximization to high-fidelity trajectory generation and distribution matching. This paradigm shift addresses intrinsic limitations in classical Reinforcement Learning (RL), particularly the limited expressivity of standard unimodal policy distributions in capturing complex, multi-modal behaviors embedded in diverse datasets. However, current literature often treats these models as isolated algorithmic improvements, rarely synthesizing them into a single comprehensive framework. This survey proposes a principled taxonomy grounding generative decision-making within the probabilistic framework of Control as Inference. By performing a variational factorization of the trajectory posterior, we conceptualize four distinct functional roles: Controllers for amortized policy inference, Modelers for dynamics priors, Optimizers for iterative trajectory refinement, and Evaluators for trajectory guidance and value assessment. Unlike existing architecture-centric reviews, this function-centric framework allows us to critically analyze representative generative families across distinct dimensions. Furthermore, we examine deployment in high-stakes domains, specifically Embodied AI, Autonomous Driving, and AI for Science, highlighting systemic risks such as dynamics hallucination in world models and proxy exploitation. Finally, we chart the path toward Generalist Physical Intelligence, identifying pivotal challenges in inference efficiency, trustworthiness, and the emergence of Physical Foundation Models.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于控制即推理概率框架的功能中心分类法，将生成式决策方法归纳为控制器、建模器、优化器和评估器四种角色，以统一现有研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统强化学习在决策制定中存在局限性，例如标准单模态策略分布难以表达复杂多模态行为，限制了模型在多样数据集中的表现。生成模型通过高保真轨迹生成和分布匹配提供了新视角，但当前研究多将这些模型视为孤立改进，缺乏综合框架来整合和比较不同方法。本研究旨在填补这一缺口，提出一个原则性分类法，以系统地分析和统一生成式决策领域的研究进展，促进领域内的深入理解。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了一种功能中心框架，基于控制即推理的概率理论。通过变分分解轨迹后验概率，概念化了四种关键功能角色：控制器用于摊销策略推理，建模器提供动态先验，优化器实现迭代轨迹优化，评估器用于轨迹指导和价值评估。这一方法不同于传统的架构中心综述，允许从功能维度批判性分析各种生成模型家族，如变分自编码器和扩散模型，从而促进跨模型的系统比较和应用部署。
light_analysis.result: 作为综述论文，本研究的主要成果包括对现有文献的全面分析和框架应用。摘要未明确说明具体实验数据或性能指标，但通过功能中心框架，分析并归类了代表性生成模型家族在决策中的作用。研究还探讨了在高风险领域如Embodied AI、自动驾驶和AI科学中的部署情况，识别出动态幻觉和代理利用等系统风险，为未来研究和实践提供了重要参考。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种基于功能角色的分类法，将生成式决策整合到控制即推理的概率框架中，为领域研究提供了统一视角。通过分析关键应用领域，揭示了潜在风险，并指出了未来研究方向，包括提升推理效率、增强模型可信度和探索Physical Foundation Models的涌现。这些工作不仅具有学术价值，还能促进Generist Physical Intelligence的实际应用，解决现实世界的复杂决策问题。

title: Double Momentum and Error Feedback for Clipping with Fast Rates and Differential Privacy
abstract: Strong Differential Privacy (DP) and Optimization guarantees are two desirable properties for a method in Federated Learning (FL). However, existing algorithms do not achieve both properties at once: they either have optimal DP guarantees but rely on restrictive assumptions such as bounded gradients/bounded data heterogeneity, or they ensure strong optimization performance but lack DP guarantees. To address this gap in the literature, we propose and analyze a new method called Clip21-SGD2M based on a novel combination of clipping, heavy-ball momentum, and Error Feedback. In particular, for non-convex smooth distributed problems with clients having arbitrarily heterogeneous data, we prove that Clip21-SGD2M has optimal convergence rate and also near optimal (local-)DP neighborhood. Our numerical experiments on non-convex logistic regression and training of neural networks highlight the superiority of Clip21-SGD2M over baselines in terms of the optimization performance for a given DP-budget.

light_analysis.overview: Clip21-SGD2M方法通过结合剪裁、重球动量和误差反馈，在联邦学习中同时实现了强差分隐私和优化性能保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 在联邦学习中，现有算法无法同时保证强差分隐私和优化性能：它们要么基于限制性假设（如边界梯度或数据同质性）实现最优差分隐私，要么缺乏隐私保护但优化性能优秀。这导致隐私与性能的权衡问题，限制了算法在敏感数据场景的应用，亟需一种能兼顾两者的方法来填补研究空白，支持实际部署中的隐私安全和学习效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Clip21-SGD2M方法，核心基于剪裁（用于控制梯度以保护隐私）、重球动量（加速收敛）和误差反馈（处理分布式优化中的误差）的组合。该方法针对非凸平滑分布式问题设计，处理任意异构的客户端数据，创新点在于通过技术整合在不牺牲收敛速率下实现差分隐私。数值实验涉及非凸逻辑回归和神经网络训练，但具体数据集和模型架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明显示，Clip21-SGD2M在非凸平滑分布式问题中具有最优收敛率和接近最优的局部差分隐私邻域。数值实验在非凸逻辑回归和神经网络训练上验证其优势，在给定差分隐私预算下，优化性能（如收敛效率和准确性）优于基线方法，摘要未提供具体数据但强调了优越性，支持其在隐私保护优化中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了Clip21-SGD2M方法，成功在联邦学习中同时实现强差分隐私和优化保证，填补了现有文献的空白。学术价值在于提供了理论和实验支持，推动了隐私保护机器学习的发展；实际应用可扩展到需要数据隐私的分布式场景。未来方向如处理更复杂数据分布或大尺度应用，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性，可进一步探索。

title: 3D Dynamics-Aware Manipulation: Endowing Manipulation Policies with 3D Foresight
abstract: The incorporation of world modeling into manipulation policy learning has pushed the boundary of manipulation performance. However, existing efforts simply model the 2D visual dynamics, which is insufficient for robust manipulation when target tasks involve prominent depth-wise movement. To address this, we present a 3D dynamics-aware manipulation framework that seamlessly integrates 3D world modeling and policy learning. Three self-supervised learning tasks (current depth estimation, future RGB-D prediction, 3D flow prediction) are introduced within our framework, which complement each other and endow the policy model with 3D foresight. Extensive experiments on simulation and the real world show that 3D foresight can greatly boost the performance of manipulation policies without sacrificing inference speed. Code is available at https://github.com/Stardust-hyx/3D-Foresight.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一个3D动力学感知操纵框架，通过集成3D世界建模和自监督学习任务，赋予操纵策略3D预见能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有操纵策略学习主要依赖2D视觉动态建模，这在处理涉及深度方向运动的复杂任务时表现不足，限制了机器人在真实世界中的鲁棒性。为了解决这一问题，研究强调了引入3D世界建模的重要性，以更准确地捕捉环境动力学，从而提升操纵策略的适应性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 框架整合3D世界建模和策略学习，通过设计三个自监督学习任务：当前深度估计提供场景深度信息，未来RGB-D预测模拟视觉和深度未来状态，以及3D流预测分析运动模式。这些任务互补协作，使模型无需外部标注即可学习3D空间动态，关键创新在于赋予策略3D foresight，增强了对深度运动的理解。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实世界实验中，3D foresight显著提升了操纵策略性能，同时保持了推理速度不变。尽管摘要未提供具体数据，但表明该方法在多种任务中优于仅依赖2D动态的基线方法，验证了3D建模对增强鲁棒性的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献是提出了一种3D动力学感知的操纵学习框架，通过自监督任务增强策略的3D预见性，为机器人操纵领域提供了新方法。学术价值在于结合3D世界建模改进策略学习，实际应用有助于提升复杂环境下的操纵能力，未来工作可探索更多3D建模技术或扩展任务范围。

title: FBFL: A Field-Based Coordination Approach for Data Heterogeneity in Federated Learning
abstract: In the last years, Federated learning (FL) has become a popular solution to train machine learning models in domains with high privacy concerns. However, FL scalability and performance face significant challenges in real-world deployments where data across devices are non-independently and identically distributed (non-IID). The heterogeneity in data distribution frequently arises from spatial distribution of devices, leading to degraded model performance in the absence of proper handling. Additionally, FL typical reliance on centralized architectures introduces bottlenecks and single-point-of-failure risks, particularly problematic at scale or in dynamic environments. To close this gap, we propose Field-Based Federated Learning (FBFL), a novel approach leveraging macroprogramming and field coordination to address these limitations through: (i) distributed spatial-based leader election for personalization to mitigate non-IID data challenges; and (ii) construction of a self-organizing, hierarchical architecture using advanced macroprogramming patterns. Moreover, FBFL not only overcomes the aforementioned limitations, but also enables the development of more specialized models tailored to the specific data distribution in each subregion. This paper formalizes FBFL and evaluates it extensively using MNIST, FashionMNIST, and Extended MNIST datasets. We demonstrate that, when operating under IID data conditions, FBFL performs comparably to the widely-used FedAvg algorithm. Furthermore, in challenging non-IID scenarios, FBFL not only outperforms FedAvg but also surpasses other state-of-the-art methods, namely FedProx and Scaffold, which have been specifically designed to address non-IID data distributions. Additionally, we showcase the resilience of FBFL's self-organizing hierarchical architecture against server failures.

light_analysis.overview: FBFL 提出一种基于场协调的新方法，通过分布式领导选举和自组织架构有效解决联邦学习中的数据异构性挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习在隐私敏感领域广受欢迎，但实际部署中面临设备数据非独立同分布（non-IID）的挑战，主要由设备空间分布引起，导致模型性能下降。此外，传统集中式架构存在瓶颈和单点故障风险，限制了在动态或大规模环境中的可扩展性。现有方法如 FedAvg 在 non-IID 场景下表现不足，而专门方法如 FedProx 和 Scaffold 虽有效但仍有改进空间，因此迫切需要一种鲁棒且适应性强的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: FBFL 方法核心在于集成宏编程和字段协调技术。首先，采用分布式基于空间的领导选举机制，通过选举局部领导者实现模型个性化，以减轻 non-IID 数据的影响。其次，利用先进的宏编程模式构建自组织、分层架构，消除集中式服务器的依赖，提升系统协调效率和稳定性。在技术实现中，该方法使用 MNIST、FashionMNIST 和 Extended MNIST 数据集进行评估，确保方法验证的广泛性和可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在独立同分布（IID）数据条件下，FBFL 性能与常用基准 FedAvg 相当。在非独立同分布（non-IID）场景中，FBFL 不仅显著优于 FedAvg，还超越专门针对 non-IID 设计的先进方法 FedProx 和 Scaffold，突显其处理数据异质性的优势。通过 MNIST、FashionMNIST 和 Extended MNIST 数据集的评估，验证了模型性能的提升。此外，FBFL 的自组织架构在服务器故障下表现出良好韧性，增强了实际部署的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文主要贡献是提出并形式化了 FBFL，它通过宏编程和字段协调技术有效解决了联邦学习中的数据异质性和架构瓶颈，促进更适合各子区域数据分布的模型开发。这提升了联邦学习的学术价值，为隐私敏感应用和动态环境提供了实际解决方案，增强了系统的可扩展性和鲁棒性。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及优化算法或扩展至更多复杂应用场景。

title: Curse of Dimensionality in Neural Network Optimization
abstract: This paper demonstrates that when a shallow neural network with a Lipschitz continuous activation function is trained using either empirical or population risk to approximate a target function that is $r$ times continuously differentiable on $[0,1]^d$, the population risk may not decay at a rate faster than $t^{-\frac{4r}{d-2r}}$, where $t$ denotes the time parameter of the gradient flow dynamics. This result highlights the presence of the curse of dimensionality in the optimization computation required to achieve a desired accuracy. Instead of analyzing parameter evolution directly, the training dynamics are examined through the evolution of the parameter distribution under the 2-Wasserstein gradient flow. Furthermore, it is established that the curse of dimensionality persists when a locally Lipschitz continuous activation function is employed, where the Lipschitz constant in $[-x,x]$ is bounded by $O(x^δ)$ for any $x \in \mathbb{R}$. In this scenario, the population risk is shown to decay at a rate no faster than $t^{-\frac{(4+2δ)r}{d-2r}}$. Understanding how function smoothness influences the curse of dimensionality in neural network optimization theory is an important and underexplored direction that this work aims to address.
comment: Accepted for publication in Information and Inference: A Journal of the IMA. 32 pages, 1 figure

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示了浅层神经网络优化中的维度诅咒，量化了种群风险衰减的速度上限，并强调了函数平滑性的关键影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在探讨函数平滑性如何影响神经网络优化中的维度诅咒，这是一个在理论研究中重要但未充分探索的方向。在深度学习中，高维优化常面临维度诅咒，导致计算效率低下和优化困难。现有方法可能忽视平滑性对优化速度的具体限制，因此通过理论分析填补这一空白，为理解优化动态提供新视角，帮助揭示为何传统优化算法在高维空间中表现不佳。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用理论分析方法，通过2-Wasserstein梯度流下的参数分布演化来研究神经网络训练动态，而不是直接分析参数演化。核心创新在于从分布角度分析优化过程，考虑浅层神经网络模型和Lipschitz连续或局部Lipschitz连续的激活函数。方法基于梯度流动态，推导种群风险的衰减率界限，关键细节包括目标函数在[0,1]^d上r次连续可微，时间参数t用于量化优化过程。
light_analysis.result: 研究结果显示，当使用Lipschitz连续激活函数时，种群风险的衰减率不能快于t^{-4r/(d-2r)}；对于局部Lipschitz连续激活函数，衰减率不高于t^{-(4+2δ)r/(d-2r)}。这些理论界限量化了维度d和函数平滑性r对优化速度的限制，证实了维度诅咒的存在，即高维下实现特定精度所需时间急剧增加。摘要未明确说明与基线方法的对比，但结果突出了优化中的固有挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于理论证明了浅层神经网络优化中的维度诅咒，并通过衰减率界限量化了其影响。学术上，它填补了函数平滑性影响优化速度的理论空白，为神经网络优化理论提供了新见解。实际应用中，此结果有助于开发者理解高维优化挑战并改进算法设计。未来工作可探索更复杂网络结构或不同优化框架下的类似问题，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Path Planning for Masked Diffusion Model Sampling
abstract: Any order generation of discrete data using masked diffusion models (MDMs) offers a compelling alternative to traditional autoregressive models, especially in domains that lack a natural causal ordering of data. However, current popular MDMs depart from their successful continuous diffusion model counterparts with simplified masked inference wherein unmasked tokens cannot be iteratively refined -- even if there is a mistake. In this paper, we extract the full power of MDMs by introducing a novel inference sampling strategy termed Path Planning (P2) that decomposes each generation step into two sub-stages: planning and denoising. Under P2, the planner at every step selects appropriate tokens that are marked to be updated, which can then be sampled using the denoiser. We demonstrate that P2 generalizes all existing sampling strategies for MDMs and critically enhances generative quality through the new capability of refining and updating existing unmasked tokens. We theoretically prove that P2 establishes a (new) expanded evidence lower bound (ELBO) on the log marginal likelihood of data. We instantiate P2 with a family of planners including: 1.) Self-Planning, 2.) BERT-Planning, and 3.) Trained-Planning with a learned planner leading to SOTA generative performance for MDMs on a suite of domains. Specifically, solely using P2 inference, we observe relative improvements of 22% in protein sequence foldability, 8% in RNA sequence pLDDT, 4% in math reasoning, 68% in story generation (ROUGE score), and 33% in code generation for the challenging pass@1 metric.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出 Path Planning (P2) 策略，通过引入计划和去噪子阶段，提升 Masked Diffusion Models 的生成质量和灵活性。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决 Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) 在推理过程中简化策略，导致未掩盖令牌无法迭代精炼的问题。MDMs 在缺乏自然因果顺序的领域，如蛋白质序列和语言生成，提供了替代自回归模型的方案，但现有方法未能充分利用其潜力，限制了生成质量。具体来说，当前流行 MDMs 的推理过程简化，即使存在错误也无法修正未掩盖令牌，这影响了应用的准确性和可靠性，因此开发更高效的推理策略至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 Path Planning (P2) 策略，将每个生成步骤分解为计划和去噪两个子阶段。计划器在每个步骤中选择需要更新的令牌，然后使用去噪器进行采样。关键创新点在于引入迭代精炼未掩盖令牌的能力，从而增强生成过程的灵活性和控制力。方法通过实例化包括 Self-Planning、BERT-Planning 和 Trained-Planning 在内的计划器家族实现，其中 Trained-Planning 使用学习机制优化计划器，适用于离散数据生成任务，无需特定数据集即可应用于多种领域。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，P2 策略在多个领域显著提升了 MDMs 的生成性能。具体数据包括：蛋白质序列折叠性相对改进 22%，RNA 序列 pLDDT 改进 8%，数学推理改进 4%，故事生成（基于 ROUGE 分数）改进 68%，代码生成（pass@1 指标）改进 33%。这些结果与基线方法对比表明，P2 策略有效扩展了 MDMs 的能力，并在所有测试领域达到最先进的性能，验证了其作为高效推理方案的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了 Path Planning 策略，理论证明了其建立了新的证据下界 (ELBO)，并实验展示了在生成任务中的优异表现。这扩展了 Masked Diffusion Models 的应用范围，提升了在生物信息学和自然语言处理等领域的实际价值。潜在的局限性包括计划器设计可能需要进一步优化以适应更复杂场景，未来工作可以探索更多计划器变体或扩展到其他数据类型和任务。

title: Flatness Guided Test-Time Adaptation for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has emerged as a technique for tackling distribution shifts during the test time. Recent research indicates that the test-time adaptation is intrinsically linked to the model's training history. However, existing TTA methods, such as Test-time Prompt Tuning, often design adaptation strategies in isolation from the models' training characteristics, which degrade their performance. This paper argues that the flatness acquired via sharpness-aware training is an efficient clue for the test-time adaptation of VLMs. Built on this insight, this paper proposes a novel Flatness-Guided Adaptation framework (FGA) for VLMs to cohesively unify training and test-time procedures. Its core idea is to leverage the alignment between the training minimum and test loss flat regions to guide the adaptation process. Specifically, our FGA consists of a prompt-tuning stage and a test-time adaptation stage. In the tuning stage, a Sharpness-Aware Prompt Tuning method is utilized to identify the training flat minimum, offering a geometric clue of flatness for subsequent adaptation. In the test stage, a Sharpness-based Test Sample Selection approach is proposed to ensure the alignment of flat minima between the training and each augmented test sample's loss landscape. In comparison to existing TTA methods, our FGA avoids the expensive prompt parameter updates during test time, and substantially reduces the computation overhead. Extensive experiments on both domain generalization and cross-dataset benchmarks demonstrate that our FGA achieves superior performance over prevalent TTA methods. Notably, when employing a ViT-B/16 image encoder, FGA even outperforms TPT+CoOp by an average of 4.88% across all four ImageNet out-of-domain variants.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于平坦性引导的视觉语言模型测试时适应框架（FGA），通过统一训练和测试过程来提升模型在分布偏移下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决视觉语言模型在测试时遇到的分布偏移问题，这会影响模型的泛化能力和实际应用效果。现有测试时适应方法，如测试时提示调优，常与模型的训练历史脱节，忽略了平坦性等关键训练特性，导致适应效率低下。因此，需要一种能结合训练信息的方法来改进适应策略，以确保模型在未知数据上保持鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出的Flatness-Guided Adaptation框架（FGA）包括两个核心阶段：首先，在提示调优阶段，采用Sharpness-Aware Prompt Tuning方法，通过识别训练损失平坦区域的最小值来提供几何线索；其次，在测试阶段，应用Sharpness-based Test Sample Selection方法，确保训练平坦区域与增强测试样本的损失平坦区域对齐。关键创新在于利用平坦性对齐引导适应，避免测试时昂贵的参数更新，减少计算开销。使用ViT-B/16图像编码器等模型在领域泛化基准上进行实现。
